programme.title: The Haunted
programme.desc: A couple call in a veteran demonologist when they hear ghostly threats and find bloody handprints on their babys crib. Stories of paranormal events

programme.desc: Pete takes on his first international build in Norway. Working with local builder, Frode, the 24 ft high retreat gives stunning views of a nearby lake

programme.desc: Sergeant Jewell discovers a father and son squatting in the desert and makes arrests for a prior warrant and drugs. programme.title: Nature and Us: A History Through Art
programme.desc: James Fox considers the way art over the past 100 years reflects how nature was swapped for progress in the first half of the 20th century, before rediscovering its beauty in the decades following the Second World War, and how todays artists are reimagining the human races future relationship with nature

programme.title: Face the Music
programme.desc: Joseph Cooper invites viewers to match their musical wits against Joyce Grenfell, Robin Ray and Derek Hart. The guest musician is soprano Isobel Baillie. First broadcast in 1973

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at life in South America, where animals must specialise if they are to carve out a niche. In Patagonia, a puma mother draws on a lifetimes experience to catch prey three times her weight, while rarely seen Andean bears clamber 30 metres into the cloud forest canopy to find elusive fruit. Poison dart frogs use ingenious methods to keep their tadpoles safe, anacondas stalk capuchin monkeys, and swifts make death-defying flights through Igauzu Falls on the border between Argentina and Brazil

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke tells the story of Ancient Egyptian art through 30 masterpieces. He treks across the Sahara and travels along the Nile to find the rarely seen pieces crafted by the countrys earliest inhabitants, and explores how the works often reflected peoples religion. He is also joined by contemporary artists who are confounded by the technical skills of the craftsmen

programme.title: Fred Dibnahs Magnificent Monuments
programme.desc: The former steeplejack examines the development of castles from early Iron Age forts to secret tunnels used during the Second World War. He visits Hadrians Wall, where he takes a look at the remains of Roman toilets, while in Warwick a band of medieval knights tests the castles defences

programme.title: Wainwright Walks: Coast to Coast
programme.desc: Julia Bradburys journey takes her across the Swaledale area of North Yorkshire, a 22-mile stretch of countryside Alfred Wainwright studied in detail. Among the historic villages and scenic landscapes, she learns about the mining industry that was once so vital to the area

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth attends the christening of Daisys granddaughter, and is displeased to learn the childs parents are not married. With some encouragement from Richard, she agrees to keep an open mind, but is later irked when the mother and child go missing. Comedy, starring Patricia Routledge and Clive Swift

programme.title: Sorry!
programme.desc: Timothy decides to leave home, but his mother is outraged when she learns of his decision to share a flat with two young women

programme.title: A History of Britain by Simon Schama
programme.desc: Simon Schama presents a profile of King Edward I, nicknamed the Hammer of the Scots and portrayed as a villainous tyrant in the 1995 film Braveheart. He established English rule over Wales, but his attempts to conquer Scotland were thwarted by the fierce resistance led by William Wallace and Robert the Bruce. As a consequence, Scotland and Wales gained a stronger sense of national identity, while Edward was forced to listen to his peoples parliament

programme.title: Storyville
programme.desc: Following five Khartoum residents, who had to flee Sudan for other countries in East Africa as a result of the ongoing Sudanese civil war, which started in 2023. Blending documentary storytelling, animation, dreams and street-level activism, this programme offers a rare and authentic account of what it has meant to live through Sudans recent upheavals

programme.title: The Girl Who Talked to Dolphins
programme.desc: Documentary exploring an attempt to teach a dolphin to understand English. In the 1960s, a scientist flooded a house and invited a young woman to live there full time with the animal in the hope that the creature would be able to communicate with her. Featuring contributions from those involved in the experiment, who are speaking about events for the first time

programme.title: The Unseen Alistair Cooke
programme.desc: A profile of the journalist and broadcaster told through interviews with friends and family. The film reveals the man behind the voice of Letter from America and includes previously unseen 8mm footage, shot by Cooke himself, of individuals who sparked his passion for the US, including silent-screen star Charlie Chaplin, Oscar-nominated actress Paulette Goddard and the final interview given by author William F Buckley Jnr

programme.title: Fred Dibnahs Magnificent Monuments
programme.desc: The former steeplejack examines the development of castles from early Iron Age forts to secret tunnels used during the Second World War. He visits Hadrians Wall, where he takes a look at the remains of Roman toilets, while in Warwick a band of medieval knights tests the castles defences

programme.title: Wainwright Walks: Coast to Coast
programme.desc: Julia Bradburys journey takes her across the Swaledale area of North Yorkshire, a 22-mile stretch of countryside Alfred Wainwright studied in detail. Among the historic villages and scenic landscapes, she learns about the mining industry that was once so vital to the area

programme.title: Storyville
programme.desc: Following five Khartoum residents, who had to flee Sudan for other countries in East Africa as a result of the ongoing Sudanese civil war, which started in 2023. Blending documentary storytelling, animation, dreams and street-level activism, this programme offers a rare and authentic account of what it has meant to live through Sudans recent upheavals

programme.title: Fred Dibnahs Magnificent Monuments
programme.desc: The former steeplejack celebrates Britains houses and palaces, travelling from the grandeur of Hampton Court in west London to a homely terrace in Beamish in Co Durham. He also visits Cragside, Northumberland, one of the first homes to have electric lighting, and helps restore a 15th-century manor in Kent by demonstrating how plaster used to be made

programme.title: Wainwright Walks: Coast to Coast
programme.desc: Julia Bradbury starts the longest section of her journey in the historic town of Richmond, which was singled out by Alfred Wainwright as one of his highlights. From there, miles of flat walking between the Dales and her last National Park await, with the North York Moors offering the broadest views and finest weather of her entire adventure

programme.title: My Garden of a Thousand Bees
programme.desc: The work of Bristol wildlife film-maker Martin Dohrn, who during the Covid-19 pandemic set out to record all the bees he could find in his tiny urban garden. Filming more than 60 different species, from Britains largest bumblebees to scissor bees, the size of a mosquito, Dohrn observes how differences in behaviour set different species apart - and eventually he gets so close he can identify individuals just by looking at them

programme.title: 100 Great Paintings
programme.desc: A look at George Stubbs 1762 painting, The Grosvenor Hunt from the Grosvenor Estate, in which the artist makes the spectator hear the sound of the huntsmans horn. First broadcast January 23 1989

programme.title: Secrets of Size: Atoms to Supergalaxies
programme.desc: Part two of two. Jim Al-Khalili explores the largest known cosmic structures, including, a vast cloud of solar plasma which surrounds and protects the solar system, the black hole at the centre of the Milky Way, which emits the lowest note ever heard in the cosmos, and the giant arc, a collection of galaxies which spans more than three per cent of the observable universe

programme.title: This Life
programme.desc: Warren realises Delilah has bulimia and tries to help her, while Miles clashes with Anna, accusing her of jealousy. Egg lets himself get over-involved with a cancer patient who believes his condition was caused by the experimental drugs he was given as a child. Jack Davenport, Daniela Nardini and Andrew Lincoln star

programme.title: This Life
programme.desc: Anna reaches the end of her tether and tries to drive bulimic Delilah out of the house. Warren antagonises Miles by telling him to take an Aids test and Egg feigns injury to evade an increasingly frustrated Millys amorous advances

programme.title: Vasa: The Ghost Ship
programme.desc: Following the work of archaeologists, divers and historians as they make new discoveries about the Vasa, a Swedish Navy flagship that was built in 1628, the height of Swedens military expansion. On its maiden voyage, the ship sank in Stockholm harbour and remained there for more than 300 years, until its discovery in 1961

programme.title: The Girl Who Talked to Dolphins
programme.desc: Documentary exploring an attempt to teach a dolphin to understand English. In the 1960s, a scientist flooded a house and invited a young woman to live there full time with the animal in the hope that the creature would be able to communicate with her. Featuring contributions from those involved in the experiment, who are speaking about events for the first time

He also visits Cragside, Northumberland, one of the first homes to have electric lighting, and helps restore a 15th-century manor in Kent by demonstrating how plaster used to be made

From there, miles of flat walking between the Dales and her last National Park await, with the North York Moors offering the broadest views and finest weather of her entire adventure

programme.title: Secrets of Size: Atoms to Supergalaxies
programme.desc: Part two of two. Jim Al-Khalili explores the largest known cosmic structures, including, a vast cloud of solar plasma which surrounds and protects the solar system, the black hole at the centre of the Milky Way, which emits the lowest note ever heard in the cosmos, and the giant arc, a collection of galaxies which spans more than three per cent of the observable universe

programme.title: Have I Got News for You

programme.desc: An incident in which police were staggered by a thief with many disguises who went on to confess far more than they could imagine. Plus, how the net closed in on a gang stealing sentimental jewellery

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Jacqui Joseph is not impressed by the mushrooms growing inside a Norfolk end-of-terrace, while Dion Dublin thinks walls need to be rebuilt in a West Midlands property. Martel Maxwell meets a foster father and son who have teamed up to become developers

programme.title: Bargain Hunt

programme.title: Just One Thing
programme.desc: Sheffield empty nesters Siva and Dhami are feeling stuck in a rut so Roman Kemp arrives to shake things up - literally. He shows them how taking up dancing could do far more than just put a spring in their step. Research reveals that adding dance to a weekly routine could boost fitness, increase brain power and lift a persons mood. Will a little rhythm rewrite their whole routine?

programme.title: The Travelling Auctioneers
programme.desc: Peter and Lisa are looking to sell some of the many things they have recently inherited from his mother. They intend to use any cash raised to renovate their garden, buying a new patio, summer house and creating a space for the entire family to come together. Auctioneer Christina Trevanion finds a rare, pure gold, £2 coin among the haul and a huge stone she thinks might be a diamond. Meanwhile, restoration expert Robin Johnson unearths an attractive but badly damaged drinks cabinet

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman helps a retired couple from Northamptonshire find their perfect coastal retreat in Devon. Theyre dreaming of a single-storey home close to the sea, and one of the properties delivers breathtaking ocean views right from the terrace. Nicki also meets a couple raising a family in a Dartmoor village, who share their love of the outdoors by mapping walks in the National Park for all ages and abilities to enjoy

programme.title: The Repair Shop on the Road
programme.sub-title: Kent - A Record-Breaking Pump Trolley Gets Back on Track
programme.desc: In Kent, Dominic Chinea and Henry restore a 100-year-old railway pump trolley, and luthier Julyan Wells helps siblings honour their late father by repairing his cherished guitar. In West Sussex, Sonnaz Nooranvary crafts a ring using the intricate Japanese metalwork technique of mokume-gane

programme.title: The Finish Line

programme.sub-title: When You Find Out You Have 468 Wax Melts
programme.desc: The team arrive in the Midlands to help dads Craig and Craig, whose home is jam-packed with toys belonging to their beloved five-year-old daughter - not only the ones she plays with now, but everything she has ever owned, which salon owner Big Craig has kept hold of for fear of losing part of her childhood. But as the process begins, Stacey finds more clutter, from almost 200 pairs of shoes to 400 tampons - which Little Craig collected for the homeless but never got round to donating

programme.title: MasterChef: The Professionals

programme.title: Installation of the Archbishop of Canterbury
programme.desc: Live coverage of the service from Canterbury Cathedral which sees Dame Sarah Mullally enthroned as the 106th Archbishop of Canterbury - the first woman to hold the position. Taking place on the Feast of the Annunciation - the day that Angel Gabriel told Mary she would be the mother of Jesus - the installation marks the symbolic start of the Archbishop of Canterburys public ministry in the Church of England and across the Anglican Communion

Mark Stuckey is entrusted with a canary yellow 1980s cassette player that belonged to owner Florences mum Mel. Other items are an Edwardian brass plate camera and a one-of-a-kind 3-D model of an adenovirus - the virus responsible for the common cold - made by an electron microscopist back in the 1960s

programme.title: Ambulance

A woman who is never seen, unattractive and ignored, she does not feel bad about herself. However, when her father dies, she starts to realise she may have to come out from the shadow and be seen. Comedy drama, written by and starring Siobhán McSweeney

programme.title: The Jetty
programme.desc: Reeling from the discovery of a body in the lake, Ember knows it will be only a matter of time before the police find the incriminating voicemails. programme.title: Funboys
programme.desc: Three childish young men try to navigate through the hardships of life. Life is good for the funboys until Callum gets his first-ever girlfriend and the change in dynamic threatens both their friendship - and Jordans life. A burgeoning relationship means that Callum no longer wants to play video games all weekend with the fellas. This proves too much for the others to bear. Comedy, with Rian Lennon and Ryan Dylan

programme.title: Funboys
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time in Ballymacnoose
programme.desc: Following a gas leak at his flat, Callum moves in with Lorcan and his father Sammy, widely regarded as Ballymacnooses biggest rotter. Driven by a desire to no longer be a pushover and in a desperate attempt to get over his break-up with Gemma, Callum goes under Sammys wing and unleashes his own inner swine. Meanwhile, Jordans two fathers are finally tying the knot and he becomes wrapped up in all the excitement of the wedding. Comedy, with Ryan Dylan and Rian Lennon

programme.title: Funboys
programme.desc: With Callum now unwelcome at Boggins farm and his flat still out of bounds because of a gas leak, he turns once more to his oldest, dearest friend, Jordan. Things seem to be going well - Jordans two fathers show Callum some much-needed sympathy and introduce him to the foreign concept of talking about his feelings. Unfortunately this new-found bond doesnt go down so well with the other member of the house - Jordan. Meanwhile, Gemma brings home a pet and unwittingly causes Lorcan to relive some very painful memories. Comedy, with Ryan Dylan and Rian Lennon

programme.title: Funboys
programme.desc: Gemma and Lorcan throw a party, but Gemma finds one of her old personality quirks coming to the fore again as she struggles to maintain her identity amidst the intoxicating brew of Lorcans old-fashioned country charm. Callum makes a new friend in Gemmas brother David, but finds theres a catch. Comedy, with Rian Lennon, Ryan Dylan and Ele McKenzie

programme.title: Ammonite (2020)
programme.desc: In the 1840s, renowned but overlooked fossil hunter Mary Anning lives a near-solitary existence with her mother in Lyme Regis. One day, amateur palaeontologist Roderick Murchison arrives in her shop with his invalid wife, asking to be allowed to learn her hunting techniques. When he departs on an expedition, he leaves Charlotte in Lyme,and asks Mary to keep an eye on his infirm wife. Historical biopic, starring Kate Winslet and Saoirse Ronan

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Adam Henson and Anita Rani head to Devon for an edition devoted to lambing. From scanning ewes for pregnancy, to the rush of new births, and bottle-feeding vulnerable lambs through their early days, Adam and Anita look at all stages of lambing, following the teamwork, care and expertise that bring new life safely into the world in a county shaped by generations of sheep farming

programme.title: We Might Regret This
programme.desc: After an intense briefing on the influencer campaign from the Olivias, Freyas misgivings about the whole endeavour are at an all-time high. Jo is in less of a celebratory mood and is stunned to find a surprise visitor at the hen do

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: Just One Thing
programme.desc: Zoe Ball, Roman Kemp and Clive Myrie show how small, everyday changes can boost wellbeing, from dancing to lift your mood to enjoying mackerel for a healthier heart. In the first episode, Clive prescribes a diet of oily fish for a woman on a mission to supercharge her health after shedding weight with the help of weight loss drugs

programme.title: The Repair Shop on the Road
programme.sub-title: Whitby - A Forbidden Maritime Memoir Resurfaces
programme.desc: In Whitby. Chris Shaw restores a secret journal from Captain Cooks first voyage, while Will Kirk helps an upholsterer to revive a chair belonging to Trevor Baylis, inventor of the wind-up radio and Dominic Chinea feels the pressure when he tries his hand at traditional woodblock printing

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Eric Knowles looks at some of the best medically themed purchases from the Bargain Hunt archives, including a collection of gruesome slides and a vintage anatomy poster

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out with Stacey Solomon
programme.desc: The decluttering team land in south London to help single mum Almarie and her 10-year-old daughter Marie overhaul their three-bedroom semi. With Staceys guidance, Almarie sorts through the belongings of her husband Marcus for the first time since his sudden death three years ago, creating space to honour old memories and create new ones. Back at the house Rob builds a stage for budding performer Marie and transforms an outhouse into an art studio

programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Politics Live
programme.desc: The latest stories from Westminster and beyond

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Rick Edwards hosts a game show in which contestants compete for the chance to win £10,000, with a single impossible answer knocking them out for the day

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: Eight players do battle in the knockout quiz. Only one will be left standing at the end, hoping to reach the Golden Run and double their money. Hosted by Alex Scott

programme.title: Chess Masters: The Endgame
programme.desc: The four remaining players from the second heat battle are faced with a giant projection screen, and realise an innovative challenge awaits - a memory test set by world number one chess player Magnus Carlsen. This is followed by a team chess game - with a sting in the tail. Presented by Sue Perkins, with analysis from David Howell and Anthony Mathurin

programme.title: Clive Myries Italian Road Trip
programme.desc: The newsreader heads to Naples, immersing himself in its famous street life and trying his hand at crafting one of the citys characterful Nativity figurines and bagging a backstage pass to the worlds oldest opera house

programme.title: Serengeti
programme.desc: The aftermath of the devastating fire has left a blackened smoking wasteland, but rain soon brings hope to the scorched earth. Kike the cheetah and wild dog leader Jasari are both teaching their cubs how to survive on their own, only to be interrupted by a grieving giraffe. A baby elephant struggles in the flooded river, while Bakari returns when his family are threatened by a rival baboon troop. Lioness Kali has surprises in store which bring hope for the future of her pride, and as things draw to a close, a death brings all the families together in a remarkable truce

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Knebworth House in Hertfordshire, Michael Aspel introduces unseen finds from previous shows, including a pair of revealing female figures originally displayed in a French brothel, and an unusual table clock with a turtle motif. Clive Farahar also describes the former owner of the house, Victorian novelist and philanderer Edward Bulwer Lytton

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: People are invited to try to make money out of their antiques by taking them to auction

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games
programme.desc: Former winners Amy Gledhill, Jacqui Joseph, Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen and Tim Vine test their general knowledge skills in a variety of trivia-based games across the week

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.sub-title: North East England and Yorkshire: Starter and Fish
programme.desc: Four chefs compete for north east England and Yorkshire with blockbuster canapes, starters and fish dishes celebrating the British film industry. The judge is chef and long-time friend of the competition Paul Ainsworth. Dishes include a pearl barley dal with a Gladiator theme and a black-and-white monkfish that celebrates Newcastle film noir

programme.title: Live UEFA Womens Champions League
programme.desc: Arsenal v Chelsea (Kick-off 8.00pm). All the action from the quarter-final first-leg tie at Emirates Stadium. The Gunners are the reigning champions and are appearing in a record 17th quarter-final, and progressed to this round after beating Belgian side OH Leuven 7-1 on aggregate in the play-off round. The Blues finished in the top four of the table in the league phase so qualified automatically for the last eight, and will hope to continue their streak of having won all of their previous six quarter-final appearances in this competition

programme.title: Greatest Gardens
programme.desc: Garden experts Diarmuid Gavin and Carol Klein are joined by guest judge Dame Prue Leith to visit three gardens. In Ballynahinch, Tomas and Thomass three and a half acre Fernhill Garden is filled with more than 4000 plants, and Karen has a suburban garden in Jordanstown. Near Crumlin, County Antrim, Will has a six acre farmhouse garden, Holly House, which he has planted over the last 27 years

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: Analysis of the days events, with Victoria Derbyshire

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest forecast

programme.title: Forensics: The Real CSI
programme.desc: At 1am in Cumbria, a 999 call reports a gang breaking into a supermarket cash machine using high-powered cutting tools. They work quickly, escaping with thousands before police arrive. Its the second ATM targeted in the region within 24 hours. Seventy miles away, news of the raids is shared with West Midlands Police, who are already pursuing a prolific gang linked to similar attacks nationwide. As the task force builds intelligence, Cumbria Police lead the forensic investigation, until a third raid heightens the urgency of the case

programme.title: Hostage
programme.desc: When Britain and the US refuse to negotiate with Islamic State, James Foley pays the ultimate price at the hands of Jihadi John. After the execution is streamed worldwide, John Cantlie reappears in a very different propaganda video. He is alive and apparently reporting on behalf of the extremists, forcing the world to question what side he is on and how far he must go to stay alive

programme.title: The Apprentice
programme.desc: After a poor showing in the first episode, the candidates are given a chance to redeem themselves with another discount buying task - this time in the Isle of Wight, where each team has to find nine items at the lowest price

programme.title: The Apprentice: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: As Alan Sugar continues his search for a new business partner, Angela Scanlon and her guests Nikita Kanda and Linda Plant take a deep dive into the candidates performances and analyse the latest task, and the drama of the boardroom. Plus, a chat with the latest person to leave the process

programme.title: Inside the Rage Machine
programme.desc: The BBCs social media investigations correspondent Marianna Spring uncovers the inside story of how social media algorithms designed to connect people have been helping to tear them apart. Insider testimony and whistleblower documents expose a machine thriving on outrage and division as part of a business model, with radicalisation, real-world violence and fractured societies some of the consequences of a system built to shape how users think, feel and see the world

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: Just One Thing
programme.desc: Sheffield empty nesters Siva and Dhami are feeling stuck in a rut so Roman Kemp arrives to shake things up - literally. He shows them how taking up dancing could do far more than just put a spring in their step. Research reveals that adding dance to a weekly routine could boost fitness, increase brain power and lift a persons mood. Will a little rhythm rewrite their whole routine?

programme.title: The Repair Shop on the Road
programme.sub-title: Kent - A Record-Breaking Pump Trolley Gets Back on Track
programme.desc: In Kent, Dominic Chinea and Henry restore a 100-year-old railway pump trolley, and luthier Julyan Wells helps siblings honour their late father by repairing his cherished guitar. In West Sussex, Sonnaz Nooranvary crafts a ring using the intricate Japanese metalwork technique of mokume-gane

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson showcases properties in the Cambridgeshire countryside for a couple of retired scientists returning to the UK from Belgium to live closer to their grandchildren. Jules also stops by the Great Fen Project, where 9,000 acres are being restored to the wetland wonder they once were

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.sub-title: North East England and Yorkshire: Starter and Fish
programme.desc: Four chefs compete for north east England and Yorkshire with blockbuster canapes, starters and fish dishes celebrating the British film industry. The judge is chef and long-time friend of the competition Paul Ainsworth. Dishes include a pearl barley dal with a Gladiator theme and a black-and-white monkfish that celebrates Newcastle film noir

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Politics Live
programme.desc: The latest stories from Westminster and beyond

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Rick Edwards hosts a game show in which contestants compete for the chance to win £10,000, with a single impossible answer knocking them out for the day

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: Eight players do battle in the knockout quiz. Only one will be left standing at the end, hoping to reach the Golden Run and double their money. Hosted by Alex Scott

programme.title: The Travelling Auctioneers
programme.desc: Pensioner David has decided to sell his rare and unique circus memorabilia and put the money raised towards a good cause - entertaining locals with his clown and variety act and helping support his poorly wife. After being greeted by a knights suit of armour, auctioneer Christina Trevanion makes museum-quality finds among Davids collection, including items that once belonged to famous circus owner PT Barnum. Meanwhile, JJ Chalmers finds an important and iconic piece of British innovation lying forgotten in a garden shed.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton heads to Devon with a mother-and-daughter duo hopeful of finding a new countryside home for the whole family in or near Dartmoor National Park

programme.title: The Repair Shop on the Road
programme.desc: Dominic Chinea is joined by an Inverness plastering expert to try to preserve art painted by Polish soldiers on the walls of the attic of Nairn Museum during the Second World War. Will Kirk is in Beauly to meet Alan MacPherson, who instructs him in the intricacies of creating shinty sticks to stand up to the rigours of this hard-fought game

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The experts visit Birmingham, where they come across a Victorian Noahs ark, a maritime telescope with a fascinating history, and an extremely rare bust of a Turk, which could make a fortune at auction if it proves to be a 17th-century English piece. Presented by Michael Aspel

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: At Oxburgh Hall in Norfolk, Anita Manning discovers a Victorian dynamometer used for measuring the pressure of steam and David Harper is taken back to the days of ocean liners with a wine stopper from 1912. Presenter Paul Martin visits Cromer to find out about the RNLIs most decorated lifeboatman

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games
programme.desc: Former winners Amy Gledhill, Jacqui Joseph, Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen and Tim Vine test their general knowledge skills in a variety of trivia-based games across the week

programme.title: Do You Know Your Place?
programme.desc: Vernon Kay hosts the final stop of the series as the quiz arrives in Leicester. Comedian and presenter Susan Calman, internet star Max Fosh and DJ Noreen Khan are back, while Paul Gorton resumes his role as unreliable tour guide, guiding viewers through the citys tales and curiosities before one of the contestants takes home the I Know My Place sweatshirt

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.sub-title: North East England and Yorkshire: Main and Dessert
programme.desc: The remaining three chefs from north east England and Yorkshire compete over mains and desserts inspired by the British film industry. The dishes are judged by veteran judge Paul Ainswort, which include a creation using duck, fresh fig and king oyster mushrooms to show what the kestrel in the classic film Kes might see whilst flying over the moors

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: The north of England is so rich in archaeological finds that Alice Roberts travels back there once again to reveal more of its fascinating history. She and the team examine a Roman fort on Hadrians Wall, evidence of early writing by the Picts in Scotland, and a 3,000-year-old Bronze Age coffin buried under a golf course

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Maisie Adam, Jack Dee and Kiri Pritchard-McLean join regular panellist Alan Davies on the comedy quiz, with host Sandi Toksvig asking questions on the theme of visual

programme.title: The Chronicles of Strangford
programme.desc: New wildlife arrives at the Lough during spring. As boat owners prepare for summer, artist Kieron Black says an emotional goodbye as he prepares to sell his late fathers vessel

programme.title: Ronan Keatings Wild Atlantic
programme.desc: Ronan continues his journey in Kerry, where he joins his brother for a fishing trip on Lough Leane, and fulfills some sporting dreams on the hurling pitch at Dr Crokes GAA club. He also meets a couple who make traditional handcrafted leather items and gets to work on a guitar strap

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: Victoria Derbyshire talks to survivors of Jeffrey Epstein in a special Newsnight programme from Washington

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest forecast

programme.title: Captive Audience: A Real American Horror Story
programme.desc: A look at the kidnapping of seven-year-old Steven Stayner in 1972 and his eventual return. His family struggled to keep his case in the public eye, but his reappearance seven years later sparked a media sensation

programme.title: Unspun World with John Simpson
programme.desc: The BBCs world affairs editor reflects on the weeks major global news stories, talking to local experts from around the world to go behind the headlines

programme.title: Inside No 9
programme.desc: Steve Pemberton and Reece Shearsmiths darkly comic anthology returns. Pantalone is planning the heist of the century - a tasty £12million in rough-cut diamonds. But if youre going to hire a bunch of complete clowns to carry out a robbery, and half of them are planning to double-cross the other half, youve not just got a recipe for disaster, youve actually got the ingredients of a Tarantino Commedia dellArte. Starring Kevin Bishop, Gemma Whelan and Paterson Joseph

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Europe on the Edge with Katya Adler
programme.desc: Katya continues her journey through Spain, where she trains with a team of firefighters and learns how the country is spending billions to fight climate change - money that is coming out of the national defence budget. She then travels to France, witnessing a rocket launch in French Guiana, and learning more about the European Space Agency, which has its base in Paris. In the capital, she also finds out about the countrys generous welfare state, before venturing into the countryside to meet farmers who are fed up with European regulation

programme.title: The Walsh Sisters
programme.sub-title: If You Say It Out Loud, Its Real
programme.desc: Hurt by Annas absence, Rachel becomes even more unsettled when Claire accidentally lets something slip. Maggie receives big news of her own and later crosses paths with Luke, who is still shaken by his last encounter with Rachel. At the flat, Anna is caught off guard by an unexpected visit from Janie, who arrives with startling news

programme.title: Global Eye
programme.desc: Investigations from BBC correspondents all over the world, revealing secrets, rooting out injustice and exposing crime, corruption and abuse

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: Just One Thing
programme.desc: Zoe Ball heads to south London to convince charity worker Latoya that gardening could be her secret wellbeing weapon. Zoe may be a beginner but the science is on her side - getting hands on with soil can build strength, bolster the immune system and reduce stress. If Latoya is willing to get her hands dirty, she could see her health blossom

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman helps a retired couple from Northamptonshire find their perfect coastal retreat in Devon. Theyre dreaming of a single-storey home close to the sea, and one of the properties delivers breathtaking ocean views right from the terrace. Nicki also meets a couple raising a family in a Dartmoor village, who share their love of the outdoors by mapping walks in the National Park for all ages and abilities to enjoy

programme.title: Egypts Unexplained Files
programme.sub-title: Ancient Icons in the Modern Age
programme.desc: The truth and lies behind ancient Egypts best-known and loved icons, including the Great Sphinx, Tutankhamun, and the lost city of Tanis

programme.title: Encounter: UFO
programme.desc: Sometimes, the mysterious unidentified objects people see in the sky touch down and leave physical evidence behind. Assuming claims of alien visitations are accurate, this programme considers what such outsiders want and how long have they been paying trips to Earth

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The worlds top 10 mysterious devices, from strange, grooved disks found in a cave in China to an ancient Greek computer to an incredible crystal skull unearthed in Mexico

programme.desc: Kidd and Harry navigate raging rapids to deliver a scow boat to its new owner. Meanwhile, Tom passes on his expertise to the young buck

programme.desc: A man brings in a 160-year-old Tiffany watch, which has no identifying markings other than the name on its face. The pressing question is how the company verify that it is genuine

programme.desc: David Dickinson and the team value antiques in Loughborough, Leicestershire. A Second World War aviators mask arrives on Mark Stevens table, an old tin is appraised by Simon Schneider, and Michael Hogben casts his eye over a canteen of cutlery fit for fine dining

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents as 22-year-old Ukrainian refugee Mariia enters the studio. Since fleeing the war, the pansexual sex therapist has settled in the UK and is now looking for love with a far-from-average man or woman who can keep up with her in the bedroom. She is followed by 24-year-old Alannah, a content creator from Bristol, who is seeking a forever bloke who can speak the language of love and feels comfortable in his body

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Married couple Tom and Kirsty are looking to try new things. With Kirstys support, Tom wants to sexually experiment with another man but having no previous experience with men leaves him worrying the fantasy wont live up to the reality. Meanwhile, childhood sweethearts Natalie and Tom continue their stay at the retreat and find themselves with a final chance to have a threesome with resident Precious, but Natalies insecurities could prove an insurmountable barrier

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the Beachfront Inn and Inlet, a Caribbean-style resort hotel in Fort Pierce, Florida. Young and inexperienced owner Brian is making guests time at the hotel miserable with dusty rooms, late-night concerts and poor service. Can Gordon prevent the business from going under?

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: In the 1970s, business mogul Emma Harte reflects on her childrens betrayal and her past entanglements with the Fairleys, taking the story back to the 1910s. With Edwin having been sent away, Emma uses her knowledge of the Fairley family to get ahead in the household. But when her friend Mac announces he is leaving, she spies an opportunity to escape too. Meanwhile, Adeles sobriety rekindles her marriage with Adam, leading to upset when he loses interest in Olivia

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Emma hasnt been seen for six months. After Edwins betrayal, shes started a new life as a well-spoken shop assistant in the bustling market town of Armley, preparing for the arrival of her baby and working tirelessly to save a maternity fund while worrying about how to provide for her child as a single mother. Back at Fairley Hall, Edwins new fiancee, Priya notices his heartache, while Adeles condition worsens. In the 1970s, Emma confronts her eldest daughter, Edwina, the ringleader of the coup against her, and is heartbroken to discover her protegee granddaughter Paulas secret romance with Jim Fairley

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps Poppy and her father Philip realise their dream of finding a holiday home in inland Andalucía that all the family can use to enjoy the Spanish sunshine. Utilising the pairs budget of £50,000, Danni lines up five fantastic options to show them

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien makes a corkscrew wine rack that has valuer Ronnie seriously impressed

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Lucas faces a tough decision in order to protect himself from his dangerous cellmate and Warren is determined to uncover the truth, no matter the cost. While Tony and Diane head to London for answers, Doms left holding the fort, but the teens have other plans. Ste returns to devastating news, a revelation leaves Warren seething, and tensions flare at The Loft. Meanwhile, when a text lands in the wrong hands, a resident is faced with a tough parenting dilemma

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Jon Kay in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Rebecca Gaines, Rebecca Loses - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Suspicions mount that Cliff has finally killed his mother, and Rebecca thinks that Mr Gaines has asked her on a date. Comedy, starring Kirstie Alley, George Wendt and Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Rebecca Gaines, Rebecca Loses - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Rebeccas misunderstanding with Mr Gaines makes her swear off men for good and the mystery of Cliffs mother is finally solved. Comedy, starring John Ratzenberger and Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: After years of searching for a millionaire, Rebecca is surprised to find herself attracted to a personable plumber, and Sam finally realises he may not be Gods gift to women after all. Guest starring Tom Berenger

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Michael stays home from school for two days in a row, causing Ray to wonder whether he is trying to avoid something. Determined to discover the truth, he deprives the youngster of television, comics and video games to sweat the answer out of him through sheer boredom

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Ray grow irritated by Robert and Amys over-the-top displays of affection - especially when the pair start giving them relationship advice. Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Gianni is hired to do some work on the kitchen, but infuriates Debra with his laziness. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Jon Manfrellotti and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles plans a holiday at his newly acquired cabin to get over the shock of Daphnes blossoming romance with Donny, and later joins forces with a lovelorn Roz to end the couples relationship. Comedy, with David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Crane brothers plan a dinner party, but agonise over who to invite, and devise an unusual game to determine the final guest list. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles tries to reclaim his luxury apartment but finds obstacles in his path, including a tap-dancing grief counsellor and wary neighbours. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Feuding brothers Niles and Frasier decide to find out once and for all which of them has the higher IQ. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon offers his support to The Verdict, a family-run restaurant known for serving traditional New Orleans cuisine with a modern and trendy twist. Owner Melika is having trouble with her controlling mother and chef Michiko who frequently gets overwhelmed and loses control of the kitchen leaving customers waiting up to two hours for their food

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In the picturesque Devon countryside, Henry Cole and Simon OBrien meet Derek and Daphne, who have decades of collecting stored in multiple barns. Henry finds a very rare tractor, which he has never found in a shed search before, while a Raleigh Shopper bike really lights Simons fire

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: The Baker family awaits the arrival of the first generation of Herdwick lambs, and look forward to finally meeting the first pygmy goats to be born in the valley. Some unexpected visitors mean they require the assistance of beekeeper George, before Matt heads over to the restoration garage to lend a hand stripping down the rest of his dads Dodge

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Jon Kay joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Craig Rowe helps freelance writer Claire and company director Simon find their dream holiday home in Nerja, in southern Spain. With five grown-up children and four grandchildren between them, the couple have decided that now is the perfect time to start a new adventure. Craig lines up five properties within their budget of £230,000

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Father-and-son duo Colin and Paul set out to turn a barn into an outdoor entertainment space in Bulgaria and in Spain, a lull in business threatens Jo and Kens hotel. Becky and Kay prepare for their first guests at their bed and breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ussy and Bobsey host at Optimal Apartments, their luxury self-catering digs in the heart of Bradford. Unfortunately for the hosts, some of their guests arent sure that flat-pack furniture equates to luxury. At least a boating trip in the local park is a smash hit - but the success doesnt prevent the hosts from having a sinking feeling at feedback time

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the second evening in the West Country and Peppe hosts an authentic Italian night. The bad news is, one of his guests doesnt like Italian food at all. Meanwhile, Richard discovers the hosts pet hamster Dexter - who may or may not be a serial killer

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next?
programme.desc: Jean Johansson catches up with Uri, Hazel and daughter Shiann on Cyprus to find out whether their vivacious villa still delivering the dream. Danni Menzies sees what Karmen has done to her beautiful bolthole in Mijas

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Football-made Josh is scouting for the perfect team-mate and hopes Ruby the Staffy could win a place in his squad. Things get off to a shaky start between Corina and cavapoo Honey. But the pooch has a trick or two up her sleeve that might turn things around. And can Ozzy the cockapoo get over his broken heart in time to capture six-year-old Auroras

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Day three of the reality contest gets under way, with eight remaining in the battle to win up to £100,000. While one contestant approaches the upcoming hunt with supreme confidence, another decides its time to abandon their role as underdog and come out fighting. Strategies shift and fortunes flip in the forest, and a dramatic twist turns the game on its head, putting even the strongest players in peril ahead of a tense and unexpected climax

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions of shows including Married at First Sight Australia, Pangolin: Kulus Journey, The Honesty Box, Silence Is Golden and Good Luck to You, Leo Grande. From May 2025

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Married at First Sight Australia, The Summit, LOL: Last One Laughing UK, Boarders, I Swear, Wheel of Fortune and Melania

programme.title: Britains Most Expensive Houses
programme.desc: Documentary following the brokers at UK Sothebys International Realty. The super prime property market is booming and competition to court ultra-high-net-worth individuals with money to spend is fierce. This programme features a grade I listed terraced home for sale overlooking Regents Park Lake. Built in 1822 and designed by renowned Regency architect John Nash, its worth an eye-watering £29million, making it one of the most expensive homes in the UK. Also in London, managing director of UK Sothebys International Realty Guy is invited to sell a rather unusual houseboat boasting five bedrooms and three bathrooms

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gordon Ramsay continues his battle to restore the failing Towns Inn in Harpers Ferry, West Virginia. After witnessing abysmal food hygiene practices in the restaurant, the chef is left in disbelief as he uncovers terrifying cleanliness issues throughout the hotel. Can he win over stubborn owner Karan Townsend and persuade her to turn things round?

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Adventure reality series where contestants hunt each other through a forest, with one side winning if they can evade detection and the other seeking to capture them. In this opening episode, the players arrive at basecamp and meet for the very first time before being split into prey and predators. As the first hunt gets underway, an initial alliance is shattered by betrayal

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by Jack Dee and GK Barry, and Jason Williamson from Sleaford Mods for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Kirstie makes a beehive piñata and a hot air balloon-inspired paper garland, perfect for a childrens party

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect tries to unlock the potential of old properties. He starts out in Stroud, where Phil and Leighla are transforming their ramshackle, listed Georgian farmhouse with an industrial-style extension. George also pays a visit to Wootton Bassett, where he helps a couple flip the layout of their Victorian end-of-terrace home

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer helps a couple who are at loggerheads over their priorities for their next property, with Becki wanting a ready-to-move-into family home, while Craig is looking for a bargain project in the popular suburbs of south Manchester. Kirstie Allsopp meets newlyweds Chris and Amy in Cheshire, who are looking to buy their first home together and want something semi-rural in pricey areas including Knutsford, Lymm and Frodsham

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Jon Kay joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: One for the Road - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of three. Don the plumber asks Rebecca to marry him, while Sam sees Diane on a TV awards show and makes the decision to get back in touch with her

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: One for the Road - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of three. Woodys new post as a city counsellor enables him to help Norm get a new job, while an unexpected turn of events could lead to a reconciliation for Sam and Diane

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: One for the Road - Part Three
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the comedy, Sam and Diane are plagued by doubts about the idea of getting back together, while rest of the regulars gang ponder the meaning of life

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy invites her brother for dinner, but he ends up outstaying his welcome, forcing Robert to take desperate measures to eject him from the couch. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra begin telling lies in a bid to cover up previous falsehoods, but Marie soon suspects what they are doing. Comedy, with Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra realises Ray is planning something for her birthday and suggests having a Chinese banquet, but her mother has already started organising an old-fashioned English tea party. Katherine Helmond guest stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink takes a dislike to KACLs newest presenter, sharp-tongued radio psychiatrist Dr Nora. Award-winning episode of the comedy series, guest starring Christine Baranski and Piper Laurie

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: When a Man Loves Two Women
programme.desc: Cassandra Stone, the woman Frasier dated on Valentines Day, agrees to go out with him again - but the appearance of his former girlfriend Faye, who has been out of the country for a while, complicates matters. Comedy, guest starring Virginia Madsen and Amy Brenneman

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne agrees to marry Donny, but has a vision that suggests he is wrong for her, and tempts fate by turning to Niles for advice on how to proceed

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Shut Out in Seattle - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Daphnes engagement to Donny leaves Niles feeling down, so he seeks solace in the arms of a younger woman. Frasier keeps getting his girlfriends name wrong, Martins relationship with Bonnie turns sour, and Roz cannot bring herself to break up with Bulldog

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tries to help the owners of Grumpy George, an English pub located in Georgetown, Texas. The pub is owned by Karen and her husband Christian, who admit that they have little idea how to run a restaurant. Chef Michael has complete control of the kitchen and the menu, but his area of expertise is Puerto Rican food and he thinks that British cuisine is bland. As a result, the restaurant lacks a quintessential British identity and money is getting tighter by the day

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Max McMurdo head to Worcestershire where Max transforms old air tanks into a sports car, while Simon makes a trendy bar bench out of old barrels

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: Janice says an emotional goodbye to some of her beloved Hampshire Down sheep, and Matts plan to build a patio and seating area in front of the farmhouse begins to take shape. Meanwhile, with the body of the Dodge fully stripped, Matt and the restoration garage team face the challenge of separating it from its chassis, and Nicola accompanies Mike on a shopping trip in search of ingredients for a celebratory paella

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Jon Kay joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Newlyweds Bev and Errol are keen to find their very own Spanish holiday home near the Mar Menor. Theyve chosen the area because of its beautiful climate and great value for money. Jasmine Harman shows them some options for their maximum budget of £65,000

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Colin and Paul make progress with their Bulgarian barn conversion and Jo and Ken open their hotel doors to the flamboyance of flamenco in Spain. Mother-and-daughter duo Becky and Kay host their first yoga retreat and in France, Jon and Angela turn an old shed into a wedding venue

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Nick hosts the weeks third visit at Impossible Motel in the centre of York, where he offers a range of quirky rooms including rock star suites complete with hot tubs and an eyebrow-raising dungeon room with a bed on chains

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Barber Natalia hopes her Nineties-themed evening will be a cut above the rest as the West Country diners gather for the third time this week. However, her spicy twist on a prawn cocktail get Peppe all hot under the collar, while Jos no-nonsense nitpicking gets her into hot water with the hostess

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next?
programme.desc: Danni Menzies revisits best friends Sarah and Jo on Corfu to find out if they are enjoying the fruits of their labour at their olive grove house. Leah Charles-King sees how Hannah and Gareth are getting on in Salobreña

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programme.desc: The property expert charts the experiences of people who have bought homes at auction. In Guildford, she meets Alison and Michael, who were forced to sell their old home when the interest rate shot up. But will their auction buy, with its unanticipated pitfalls, give them the financial freedom theyre looking for? She also meets a couple tackling a creaky seven-bedroom BandB in Cornwall and visits an old council loo in Newport, south Wales, thats been transformed into a unique performance space by local resident Janet

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Emmas new shop is flourishing - and so is romance with the handsome David. But love has let her down before, and she finds herself torn between following her heart and revenge on the Fairleys. Meanwhile, a newly sober Adele crashes back into Fairley Hall, jeopardising Adam and Olivias affair and Edwins upcoming marriage to Priya. In the 1970s, Emma commands her granddaughter Paula to break off her romance with Jim Fairley, forcing Paula to choose between her grandmother and her lover

programme.title: Moors Murders
programme.desc: Analysis of never-before-seen letters from Ian Brady and Myra Hindley, written over their five decades in prison, and personal accounts from those who knew them. The first episode features an eyewitness account of the last murder from Myra Hindleys brother-in-law David Smith, and contributions from 1960s pop singer Janie Jones, who befriended Hindley in prison and conducted a 40-year-long correspondence with both Hindley and Brady

programme.title: Moors Murders
programme.desc: Following the arrest of Brady for a single murder, police discover a tape recording of a 10-year-old girl being tortured and realise they are investigating a string of murders. Eyewitness Clive Entwistle describes the first police search of the moors above Manchester. He was present when the remains of the girl on the tape were found, and explains how police used photographs of the serial-killing couple posing on the moors to locate the body of the third known victim, a 12-year-old boy

programme.title: Moors Murders
programme.desc: Hindleys brother-in-law David Smith and journalist Clive Entwistle describe the killers trial in 1966, and recall the tension in court as they faced justice, including the moment when a tape recording of a girl being tortured was played. The film also documents Myra Hindleys life in prison, and her protracted, unsuccessful campaign to secure her parole

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks into the luxurious Lakeview Hotel on Lake Chelan, Washington, where the bedrooms are empty and the hotels restaurant and ice-cream parlour are failing. Gordon confronts owner Brents inappropriate and miserly behaviour, but is it enough to repair the establishments reputation?

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The players discover who is the first to be culled. The group barely have time to recover from this shocking revelation before day two dawns and the hunt begins again. One friendship faces the ultimate test in the heat of the moment, while the breaking of a secret deal leads to a fiery clash back at base. With loyalties divided and trust called into question, the players with power must choose who to keep in the contest

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home

programme.title: Sunday Brunch

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the Beachfront Inn and Inlet, a Caribbean-style resort hotel in Fort Pierce, Florida. programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: In the 1970s, business mogul Emma Harte reflects on her childrens betrayal and her past entanglements with the Fairleys, taking the story back to the 1910s. With Edwin having been sent away, Emma uses her knowledge of the Fairley family to get ahead in the household. But when her friend Mac announces he is leaving, she spies an opportunity to escape too. Meanwhile, Adeles sobriety rekindles her marriage with Adam, leading to upset when he loses interest in Olivia

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Emma hasnt been seen for six months. After Edwins betrayal, shes started a new life as a well-spoken shop assistant in the bustling market town of Armley, preparing for the arrival of her baby and working tirelessly to save a maternity fund while worrying about how to provide for her child as a single mother. Back at Fairley Hall, Edwins new fiancee, Priya notices his heartache, while Adeles condition worsens. In the 1970s, Emma confronts her eldest daughter, Edwina, the ringleader of the coup against her, and is heartbroken to discover her protegee granddaughter Paulas secret romance with Jim Fairley

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps Poppy and her father Philip realise their dream of finding a holiday home in inland Andalucía that all the family can use to enjoy the Spanish sunshine. Utilising the pairs budget of £50,000, Danni lines up five fantastic options to show them

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

While Tony and Diane head to London for answers, Doms left holding the fort, but the teens have other plans. programme.desc: After years of searching for a millionaire, Rebecca is surprised to find herself attracted to a personable plumber, and Sam finally realises he may not be Gods gift to women after all. Guest starring Tom Berenger

programme.desc: Michael stays home from school for two days in a row, causing Ray to wonder whether he is trying to avoid something. Determined to discover the truth, he deprives the youngster of television, comics and video games to sweat the answer out of him through sheer boredom

programme.desc: Documentary following the brokers at UK Sothebys International Realty. programme.desc: Analysis of never-before-seen letters from Ian Brady and Myra Hindley, written over their five decades in prison, and personal accounts from those who knew them. Joey rehearses for a film role with a major star, while Phoebe and Rachel make a startling discovery. Comedy, guest starring Kathleen Turner, Elliott Gould and Gary Oldman

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Monica and Chandlers Wedding - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. The gang continues to search for the missing Chandler, who is still suffering a severe case of premarital jitters. Joey tries desperately to be released from his role in a major film so he can act as minister at the wedding. Gary Oldman and Kathleen Turner guest star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel tries to decide what to do next, while Phoebe takes some of the heat off her by claiming she is the one who is pregnant. Chandler has trouble on the dance floor and Joey tries to impress an important Broadway producer with his acting ability. Jennifer Aniston and Lisa Kudrow star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Red Sweater
programme.desc: Joey becomes convinced Phoebe is pregnant and proposes to her so she will not have to be a single mother - but Monica quickly tells him the truth. Meanwhile, Chandler and Ross misplace the disposable cameras used during the wedding

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel reveals the identity of the father of her baby, while Chandler and Monica go on their honeymoon, but are constantly upstaged by another couple who get preferential treatment wherever they go

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross and Rachels attempt to explain how they ended up in bed together descends into an argument about who made the first move - until Ross shocks everyone by announcing he captured the whole encounter on videotape. David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross is horrified to learn Rachel is going on a date with a handsome soap star, and Chandler sabotages a quirky workmates chances of promotion. Meanwhile, Phoebe is attracted to a cute but clumsy chef whom Monica plans to fire. Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Halloween Party
programme.desc: Phoebe finds herself attracted to flighty twin sister Ursulas fiance as the gang has fun at Monicas Halloween party. The Bings dress up as Catwoman and a pink bunny, and Rachel tries to kick-start her maternal instincts with a host of trick-or-treaters. Guest starring Sean Penn

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Pregnant Rachel considers moving out, prompting Ross to tell her about a vacancy in his building, and Joey creates a nursery to persuade her to stay. Eric dumps Ursula for twin sister Phoebe, and Monica suspects her new maid could be stealing her jeans - among other things. Guest starring Sean Penn

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel finally tells her father she is pregnant, prompting him to confront Ross - who is just snuggling up to new girlfriend Mona. Monica feels guilty about denying Chandler a stripper on his stag night so she books one to make amends - but he gets a lot more than he bargained for

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The gang celebrates Thanksgiving and Monica invites old high-school friend Will, the only student who was fatter than her - unaware of his animosity toward Rachel. Meanwhile, Chandler and Phoebe try to avoid helping in the kitchen and Joey vows to eat an entire turkey. Guest starring Brad Pitt

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe discovers Ben goes to school with Stings son and immediately sets about trying to wangle free concert tickets. programme.sub-title: The One with the Creepy Holiday Card
programme.desc: Rachels hormones act up, prompting her to proposition Joey, and Chandlers newly divorced boss takes him to a strip club, convinced he and Monica are having problems. Meanwhile, Ross is disturbed to learn girlfriend Mona wants them to send out joint Christmas cards like a married couple

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Dates Rachel
programme.desc: Rachel hits the town with Joey to coach him for a big date the following night, but the pair are so compatible they begin to see each other in a different light. Chandler sets a new record on Monicas game machine, and Ross teaches a class on the other side of town

programme.desc: Monica mistakenly believes Joey is infatuated with Phoebe, and Chandler discovers the pleasures of a scented bath. Rachel vows not to find out the sex of her unborn child

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Secret Closet
programme.desc: A concerned Joey takes Rachel to the hospital and realises his romantic feelings for her could be excluding Ross from the joys of fatherhood. programme.sub-title: The One with Monica and Chandlers Wedding - Part Two

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel tries to decide what to do next, while Phoebe takes some of the heat off her by claiming she is the one who is pregnant. programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Red Sweater
programme.desc: Joey becomes convinced Phoebe is pregnant and proposes to her so she will not have to be a single mother - but Monica quickly tells him the truth. Meanwhile, Chandler and Ross misplace the disposable cameras used during the wedding

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel reveals the identity of the father of her baby, while Chandler and Monica go on their honeymoon, but are constantly upstaged by another couple who get preferential treatment wherever they go

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross and Rachels attempt to explain how they ended up in bed together descends into an argument about who made the first move - until Ross shocks everyone by announcing he captured the whole encounter on videotape. David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross is horrified to learn Rachel is going on a date with a handsome soap star, and Chandler sabotages a quirky workmates chances of promotion. Meanwhile, Phoebe is attracted to a cute but clumsy chef whom Monica plans to fire. Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Halloween Party
programme.desc: Phoebe finds herself attracted to flighty twin sister Ursulas fiance as the gang has fun at Monicas Halloween party. The Bings dress up as Catwoman and a pink bunny, and Rachel tries to kick-start her maternal instincts with a host of trick-or-treaters. Guest starring Sean Penn

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Pregnant Rachel considers moving out, prompting Ross to tell her about a vacancy in his building, and Joey creates a nursery to persuade her to stay. Eric dumps Ursula for twin sister Phoebe, and Monica suspects her new maid could be stealing her jeans - among other things. Guest starring Sean Penn

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel finally tells her father she is pregnant, prompting him to confront Ross - who is just snuggling up to new girlfriend Mona. Monica feels guilty about denying Chandler a stripper on his stag night so she books one to make amends - but he gets a lot more than he bargained for

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The gang celebrates Thanksgiving and Monica invites old high-school friend Will, the only student who was fatter than her - unaware of his animosity toward Rachel. programme.desc: Phoebe discovers Ben goes to school with Stings son and immediately sets about trying to wangle free concert tickets. programme.desc: Rachels hormones act up, prompting her to proposition Joey, and Chandlers newly divorced boss takes him to a strip club, convinced he and Monica are having problems. Meanwhile, Ross is disturbed to learn girlfriend Mona wants them to send out joint Christmas cards like a married couple

programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Dates Rachel

programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Takes a Bath

programme.sub-title: The One with the Secret Closet

programme.desc: Rachel panics at the thought of caring for her baby and reluctantly agrees to her mother moving in - much to Rosss annoyance. Chandler tries to help Joey prepare for his audition as a TV quiz show host by constantly playing a baffling game

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Cooking Class
programme.desc: Phoebe holds a job interview coaching session for a nervous Chandler, and Ross unwittingly makes Rachel jealous by flirting with a sales assistant. Monica is stung by a restaurant reviewers comments and joins his cookery class to persuade him to reconsider his opinion

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Is Late
programme.desc: Phoebe and Monica have fun placing bets on when Rachels overdue baby will arrive, while Chandler accompanies Joey to the premiere of his new film - and promptly falls asleep

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: Michael presents another hour of entertainment, featuring Ellie Goulding singing Like a Saviour, Jermaine Jenas handing over his mobile in Send to All and a duet from the two Unexpected Stars of the Show. programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: Irreverent panel show hosted by Jimmy Carr. programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: Guests Dr Christian Jessen, former Girls Aloud singer Kimberley Walsh and comedians Russell Kane and Josh Widdicombe join host Jimmy Carr in an extended edition of the irreverent panel show, in which teams captained by Jon Richardson and Sean Lock answer questions based on opinion polls carried out around the country

programme.title: Jimmy Carrs Am I the A**hole?

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: The cast perform a vampire scene as aggressive talk-show guests, Jackass stuntmen and Elvis, while pop star Jordin Sparks joins for a samba dubbing scene

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Return of the adult animation following the adventures of four young boys - Stan, Cartman, Kenny and Kyle - who live in a bizarre Colorado town, famed for its weird and inexplicable happenings. programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: In 1996, two girls and their mother enjoying a walk in the Kent countryside were the victims of a frenzied hammer attack by Michael Stone, who left them for dead. Lin Russell and her six-year-old daughter Megan died from their injuries, but nine-year-old Josie survived and made a remarkable recovery. This film examines the events surrounding the murders and features interviews with Shaun Russell - Lins widower and the girls father - Josies close friend Lucy Gregson, her former primary school teacher Lynda Roberts and police family liaison officer Pauline Smith

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: The story of nurse Beverley Allitt, who was thought to be a caring and astute worker, until it was revealed she killed four children and tried to murder 11 others

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: On July 1, 2000, eight-year-old Sarah Payne went missing while playing in a field near her grandparents home in West Sussex, and her disappearance prompted a nationwide search. On July 17, her body was found near Pulborough, and soon after convicted paedophile Roy Whiting was charged with her abduction and murder. In this documentary, Sara Payne relives the day her daughter went missing and recounts the horror and agonising days that unfolded in its wake. She also speaks about her fight to change the system in the UK so parents could find out if a child sex offender was living in their area
