programme.desc: Lord and Lady Fitzalan Howard, the owners of Carlton Towers near Selby in North Yorkshire, prepare to host a fitness boot camp weekend at their property - while also welcoming an array of guests to celebrate their sons birthday. Meanwhile, Sir Benjamin Slade hopes a murder mystery weekend at Maunsel House in Somerset will help pay off a sizeable electricity bill

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores the history of Bristol, beginning by learning a grisly secret at the docks before meeting Mercury Prize-winning musician Roni Size to discuss life in the St Pauls and Stokes Croft areas of the city. He also explores the district of Clifton and visits a speakeasy-style bar

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Liverpool, cutting through cliches about football and the Beatles to explore its less-celebrated treasures. Among his destinations are a 1930s banking building that has remained unaltered since closing in 2007, a well-appointed set of toilets and a recording studio hidden in a bar. He also discovers which former dictator once spent Christmas in the city

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Arya returns to Winterfell and is reunited with Sansa and Bran, while Daenerys takes matters into her own hands and launches a surprise attack on the Lannister army. Jaime and Bronn collect the spoils from the war with the Tyrells

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Daenerys demands loyalty from the surviving Lannister soldiers and makes an offer to the lords of Westeros, while Jon heeds Brans warning about white walkers on the move. Cersei vows to vanquish anyone or anything that stands in her way

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: At Winterfell, Littlefinger schemes to isolate Sansa, while tensions between Arya and her ssister increase after the discovery of a letter. Jon and his men go beyond the wall to capture a white walker, while Daenerys has to make a tough decision

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion tries to save Westeros from itself as everyone meets in Kings Landing to discuss the fate of the realm, Sansa confronts Arya, while Sam reaches Winterfell, where he and Bran discover a shocking secret about Jon

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The Wall, which has protected the Seven Kingdoms for 8,000 years, has fallen, and the Night Kings army of the dead marches towards Westeros. Meanwhile, Jon and Daenerys arrive in Winterfell, and the Stark children are reunited. Starring Emilia Clarke, Kit Harington and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.sub-title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
programme.desc: After arriving at Winterfell, Jaime Lannister is confronted with the consequences of his past mistakes. Meanwhile, Daenerys learns the truth about her relationship with Jon, Brienne of Tarth becomes a Knight, and the army of the dead approach Winterfell. Starring Emilia Clarke, Kit Harington and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The Night King and the army of the dead reach Winterfell, and an epic battle between the living and the dead begins. Starring Emilia Clarke, Kit Harington and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: After the Battle of Winterfell, the Great War to gain control over the mythical land of Westeros continues as Jon and Daenerys look to the south. Meanwhile, Jon shares a secret with his siblings. Starring Emilia Clarke, Kit Harington and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Varys betrays his queen, and Daenerys brings her forces to Kings Landing as the explosive final battle for the Iron Throne begins. Starring Emilia Clarke, Kit Harington and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The final episode of the fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire series of novels. The Great War to gain control over the mythical land of Westeros continues. In the aftermath of the devastating battle at Kings Landing, Daenerys declares her intentions for Westeros, and Tyrion faces the consequences of his actions. Starring Emilia Clarke, Kit Harington and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Belinda tries to redirect Tanyas focus to her business proposal, Paula grows increasingly disillusioned with the Mossbachers, and Rachel begins to question her future

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Rachel shares some harsh truths with Shane and confides in Belinda. Armond goes on an all-out bender and exacts the ultimate revenge on his nemesis

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Rhaenyra struggles to come to terms with her sons murder, Alicent grows concerned by Aegons Small Council. Return of the fantasy drama set 200 years before the events of Game of Thrones and telling the story of House Targaryen. Starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra questions Daemons loyalty as Otto schemes to turn the public against her, while Ser Criston Cole concocts a misguided plan for revenge

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As ancient grudges resurface, Rhaenys suggests that Alicent may see reason while the men around her seek bloodshed. Ser Criston proposes a bold scheme, while Daemon arrives at Harrenhal to raise an army for the Blacks

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.sub-title: The Red Dragon and the Gold
programme.desc: In Rhaenyras absence and with no word from Daemon at Harrenhal, Rhaenys tries to keep the peace on the Black Council as Cole mounts a campaign into the Crownlands. In Kings Landing, Aemond continues to undermine Aegons fragile hold on authority. Fantasy drama, starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: In this edition the actor explores the luxury hotels of Hong Kong. Home to more skyscrapers than any other city, he first checks in to the Mandarin in the financial district, before experiencing the Four Seasons, the only hotel with two Michelin three-star resturants, as well as the timeless Peninsula in Kowloon, which even provides a Rolls-Royce airport taxi service. He ends his stay at the Ritz-Carlton, home to the worlds highest swimming pool

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor explores Berlin, visiting the arty Propeller Island City Lodge - a hotel where guests can fulfil their fantasies by sleeping in lion cages, coffins or rotating beds. At the Schlosshotel in affluent Grunewald, cabaret dancer Romy Haag talks to Richard about her affair with David Bowie, who stayed at the hotel while living in the German capital in the 1970s

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming discovers more little-known facts on a journey between Smithfields and Spitalfields, two of Londons most famous markets. He begins with a fry-up breakfast before visiting the remains of a Roman amphitheatre and investigating a mysterious secret in a Liverpool Street hotel, as well as meeting former EastEnders star Larry Lamb (Archie Mitchell)

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores Newcastle, discovering strange sounds by the river and finding out how traditional culture is being reinterpreted in the Byker district. He goes behind the scenes at Newcastle United with local football hero Peter Beardsley, learns about the history of adult comic Viz from former editor Simon Donald and accompanies comedienne Sarah Millican to her favourite part of the city

programme.title: Spy Kids (2001)
programme.desc: A megalomaniac threatens to take over the world, so two married spies come out of retirement to thwart his plans. However, when they go missing, it is up to their plucky children to step in and save the day. Family adventure directed by Robert Rodriguez, starring Antonio Banderas, Carla Gugino, Alan Cumming, Alexa Vega and Daryl Sabara

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: Island of Lost Dreams (2002)
programme.desc: The pint-sized secret agents investigate a mad scientist who has meddled with powerful forces and created a host of bizarre mutant animals. However, the villain is not the only problem they have to face, as another pair of youngsters are determined to outshine them. Family adventure sequel, starring Antonio Banderas, Steve Buscemi and Carla Gugino

programme.title: Spy Kids 3-D: Game Over (2003)
programme.desc: Young agent Juni has to go it alone when his big sister Carmen is kidnapped by the evil Toymaker, forcing the plucky junior spy to infiltrate the villains virtual reality world to rescue her. Adventure sequel, starring Daryl Sabara, Alexa Vega, Sylvester Stallone, Antonio Banderas, Ricardo Montalban, George Clooney, Steve Buscemi, Salma Hayek and Elijah Wood

programme.title: Batman: Return of the Caped Crusaders (2016)
programme.desc: When their fiendish foes unite against them once more, Batman and Robin attempt to take them down. Animated adventure, with the voices of Adam West, Burt Ward and Julie Newmar, reprising their roles from the 1960s live action series

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Animal Instincts (2015)
programme.desc: The dark knight joins forces with a team of superheroes including Green Arrow and The Flash to battle the mastermind behind a horse of deadly robotic animals. Animated superhero adventure, with the voices of Roger Craig Smith and Chris Diamantopoulos

programme.title: The Wild Robot (2024)
programme.desc: Following a shipwreck, a robot called Roz survives on an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals. Family animation, with the voices of Lupita Nyongo, Pedro Pascal, Kit Connor and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 3 (2024)
programme.desc: The blue hedgehog, Knuckles and Tails reunite to face the might of the villainous Shadow, who possesses powers unlike anything they have seen before. Outmuscled on every front, Sonic seeks help from an unlikely source, Dr Ivo Robotnik. Fantasy adventure sequel based on the videogame, starring Jim Carrey, James Marsden and Tika Sumpter

programme.title: The BFG (2016)
programme.desc: An orphaned girl befriends a benevolent giant, who takes her off to a magical land, where they attempt to stop the man-eating creatures that are invading the human world. Steven Spielbergs fantasy adventure based on Roald Dahls book, starring Mark Rylance, Ruby Barnhill and Penelope Wilton

programme.title: The Last Airbender (2010)
programme.desc: A chosen one with mastery of the four elements is charged with keeping the peace between four nations. When he disappears while still a boy, one of these factions sees a chance to gain absolute power and wages war on the others. After 100 years, the chosen one is found and must find a way to restore harmony. Fantasy adventure based on the cartoon series, starring Noah Ringer and Dev Patel.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit (2018)
programme.desc: A mischievous rabbit has the run of a farm and its vegetable patch when the owner unexpectedly dies. When a relative inherits the property, he strives to rid his land of the rabbit and his woodland friends - but his feelings for a nature-loving woman complicate the battle of wits with the animal kingdom. Family comedy based on Beatrix Potters stories, starring Domhnall Gleeson and Rose Byrne, with the voices of James Corden and Margot Robbie

programme.title: The Wild Robot (2024)
programme.desc: Following a shipwreck, a robot called Roz survives on an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals. Family animation, with the voices of Lupita Nyongo, Pedro Pascal, Kit Connor and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse (2018)
programme.desc: After being bitten by a radioactive arachnid, student Miles Morales develops incredible abilities, and becomes a version of Spider-Man. When a super collider device opens a gateway to other dimensions, Miles crosses paths with five counterparts to stop a threat for all realities. Oscar-winning animated adventure, with the voices of Shameik Moore and Nicolas Cage

programme.title: Ready Player One (2018)
programme.desc: In 2045, gamers explore a virtual world in the quest for a deceased tycoons fortune. However, they must also contend with an evil corporation who will stop at nothing to get their hands on the prize. Steven Spielbergs fantasy adventure based on Ernest Clines novel, starring Tye Sheridan, Olivia Cooke, Ben Mendelsohn, Simon Pegg and Mark Rylance

programme.desc: Animated action-adventure, with the voices of Diedrich Bader and Nolan North. Superman and the Justice League team up with their Bizarro League counterparts to thwart Darkseids attempt to conquer the galaxy

programme.title: DC Super Hero Girls: Legends of Atlantis (2018)

Family comedy based on Beatrix Potters stories, starring Domhnall Gleeson and Rose Byrne, with the voices of James Corden and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: A reporter discovers four humanoid amphibians who live in the sewers of New York, and use their martial arts skills to fight crime. She helps them as they face their toughest challenge yet - defeating a sinister criminal organisation that seems to have power over the entire city. Fantasy adventure, starring Megan Fox and William Fichtner, with the voice of Johnny Knoxville

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark (1981)
programme.desc: Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones goes in search of the legendary Ark of the Covenant, a biblical artefact of devastating power. His quest leads him to Egypt, where the Nazis are plotting to use the Ark to further Hitlers plans for world domination - aided by Joness deceitful French rival. The first of five big-screen action adventures, starring Harrison Ford as Indy, with Karen Allen, Paul Freeman and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom (1984)
programme.desc: The intrepid archaeologist, with his young sidekick and a nightclub singer in tow, is stranded in India, where he takes on a mission to recover magical sacred stones from the hands of an evil cult engaged in human sacrifice and child slavery. Steven Spielbergs action adventure, starring Harrison Ford, Kate Capshaw, Ke Huy Quan and Amrish Puri

programme.title: Aquaman (2018)
programme.desc: The underwater kingdom of Atlantis is ruled by the power-hungry King Orm. With a huge army at his command, he plans to conquer the oceanic people before taking on the rest of the world. Arthur Curry, Orms half-brother and the human-raised heir to Atlantis, embarks on a globetrotting quest to stop him. But a ruthless mercenary is on his trail, seeking revenge. Superhero adventure, starring Jason Momoa, Nicole Kidman and Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Venom (2018)
programme.desc: While exploring space for new worlds, a probe belonging to the Life Foundation discovers a comet covered in symbiotic lifeforms. Following the probes return to Earth, journalist Eddie Brock investigates sinister trials being carried out by the corporation, and after being infected by an alien symbiote, develops superhuman strength and power. Fantasy adventure, starring Tom Hardy and Riz Ahmed

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)

programme.title: Icefall (2025)
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

programme.title: Man Finds Tape (2025)
programme.desc: After finding mysterious video clips, siblings investigate the strange recordings and uncover a disturbing secret. Horror thriller, starring Kelsey Pribilski and William Magnuson

programme.title: Adulthood (2025)
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed

programme.title: Coyotes (2025)
programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen

programme.title: Sketch (2025)
programme.desc: When a young girls sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, her drawings burst into life. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worleys fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and DArcy Carden

programme.title: Plainclothes (2025)
programme.desc: An undercover agent assigned to lure and arrest gay men defies orders when he falls for a target. Writer/director Carmen Emmis thriller, starring Tom Blyth, Russell Tovey and Maria Dizzia

programme.title: On Swift Horses (2025)
programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.title: Nobody 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Former assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday, but soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a bloodthirsty crime boss. Comedy thriller, starring Bob Odenkirk, Connie Nielsen and Christopher Lloyd

programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a clients wedding, Lucy meets the grooms brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Songs romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth (2025)
programme.desc: Profit-hungry pharmaceutical representative Martin Krebs contracts covert operations specialist Zora Bennett to assemble a crack team to infiltrate a forbidden island and collect the DNA of three key dinosaur species. Fantasy adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Mahershala Ali and Jonathan Bailey

programme.sub-title: The Murder of Little Miss Nobody
programme.desc: The fragments of evidence that helped piece together what happened to 15-year-old Karen Price, who disappeared in 1981 only for her body to be found eight years later

programme.title: Worlds Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the life and crimes of Wayne Williams who is serving life in prison for the murder of two men but suspected to be responsible for at least 24 other murders

programme.title: How I Caught the Killer
programme.desc: Detective Jon Buehler looks back at his investigation into the drive-by-shooting of athlete Sulu Palega, a crime that took place in San Francisco in 1994

programme.title: Murder at the Post Office
programme.desc: In 2010, the North Yorkshire village of Melsonby was left in shock when postmistress Diana Garbutt was found murdered in the post office she ran with her husband Robin. He claimed shed been the victim of a violent intruder, but as detectives probed further, suspicion began to fall on him and he was convicted of her murder and sentenced to life in prison in 2011. This documentary re-examines the case, featuring interviews with those convinced Robin was wrongfully convicted and others who are unsure and still suspect he is guilty

programme.title: Murder at the Post Office
programme.desc: At trial, the prosecution alleges Robin was stealing from the Post Office and evidence from the Horizon computer system is a key part of the case against him

programme.title: Murder at the Post Office
programme.desc: Robin is sentenced to 20 years, but key evidence is missing, with none of his DNA on the murder weapon and data from the Horizon system unable be trusted

programme.title: I Am Steve McQueen
programme.desc: The life and career of the American actor, who starred in The Thomas Crown Affair, The Getaway, Papillon, The Magnificent Seven, The Great Escape and The Towering Inferno. Featuring contributions by his son Chad, grandson Steven and granddaughter Molly, as well as ex-wives Neile Adams McQueen and Ali MacGraw and widow Barbara Minty McQueen

programme.desc: Documentary focusing on the daily life of actor Val Kilmer, featuring never-before-seen footage spanning 40 years

programme.desc: Andy McGrath heads to Scotland, learning about a terrifying family of cannibals who used to prey upon weary travellers, and the prehistoric origins of the Loch Ness monster

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts spends a year visiting archaeological digs around the country, finding out about discoveries that shed new light on British history. In a Roman-themed first edition, she examines the mystery surrounding the skeletons of 97 babies found beside the Thames, a newly discovered town in rural Devon and a cult figure buried for 1,700 years beneath a fort

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: Death shall come on swift wings to him who disturbs the peace of the King so the famous inscription goes. A mysterious curse haunts the original discoverers of Tutankhamun.

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: Investigating a strange creature seen in a wooded area of rural Massachusetts by three different people who all gave similar descriptions. Could the so-called Dover Demon be a never before discovered animal or could it have come from another civilisation?

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained

programme.title: Digging for Britain

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: The discovery of a mysterious 500-year-old manuscript, with almost 300 pages full of handwritten notes and illustrations

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: A further look at some of the worlds most strange unexplained phenomena. This second episode looks at the mysterious disappearance of US union official Jimmy Hoffa in July 1975. He was declared dead seven years later

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Forest fires threaten Rust Valley and after his neighbour loses 350 cars, Mike hoards back fuel in case he needs to save his own collection, Cassidy leads the charge on a unique project for charity and James takes on an impossible job

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: According to folklore, pots of gold and wishes are granted if a Leprechaun is caught. These mysterious little creatures are seemingly only found in Ireland. Alleged sightings of leprechauns and fairies are nothing new in Ireland. In fact, many claim they are part of everyday life on the Emerald Isle. Experts debate whether these Celtic creatures are fact or fiction

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: A hoard of golden coins are found in the prospecting district of California, and a similarly valuable find in an old piano in rural England

programme.title: Evidence of the Unexplained
programme.desc: Thousands of UFO sightings are reported every year, along with terrifying abductions and other bizarre occurrences. This series examines these accounts and explores recently declassified top secret UFO files, casting new light on historic cases

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the 900-year history of Leeds Castle in Kent, from its origins as a royal Saxon familys manor and Norman stronghold to the private property of six medieval queens, a Tudor palace, a Jacobean country house and a Georgian mansion. Its last owner, Lady Olive Baillie, made it a centre of lavish hospitality for leading politicians, international royalty and film stars. When she died in 1974, she bequeathed the castle and grounds to a specially created charitable trust so that future generations could enjoy her home

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Lancaster Castle has witnessed scenes of historical, cultural and political significance throughout the centuries, including incidents of religious persecution, the trials of the Lancashire Witches and 200 public executions. Owned by the Duchy of Lancaster, it was a state prison until 2011 and is still a working crown court. Dan Jones explores its turbulent history and meets Wendy Robinson, a retired prosecutor from Australia, whose ancestors were sentenced to death at Lancaster Crown Court in 1817 for stealing sheep

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Arundel Castle, in West Sussex, has been the seat of the Dukes of Norfolk and their ancestors for over 850 years, with its fortunes rising and falling with those of the Howard family. A particularly low point occured when Thomas Howard, the fourth Duke of Norfolk, was executed by Elizabeth I for allegedly plotting to marry her rival Mary Queen of Scots. Dan Jones meets a weapons expert, who shows him how Richard FitzAlan, the third Earl of Arundel, would have fought in the 100 Years War. He also meets a social historian, who gives an insight into how Arundel would have prepared for Queen Victorias visit in 1846

programme.title: Great British Castle Rescue
programme.desc: Rick Edwards arrives at Lowther Castle, which was gutted by the 7th Earl of Lonsdale. Now, Jim Lowther, the 7th Earls son, is trying to save it

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: A Norman Panic Room and a Mesolithic Fish Trap
programme.desc: Archaeological treasures in the west of Britain, including a rare medieval cemetery, a disappearing Mesolithic landscape, a mysterious iron age burial, and the ruins of a gothic masterpiece. Presented by Alice Roberts

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.sub-title: Theres No Crying in Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chum tries to put his best foot forward when a Nike Lebron shoe hits the counter, while Rick keeps a close watch on a seller who comes in with a signed Pulp Fiction poster. Corey might be in over his head when Jim Henson sculptures float his way

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Detroit, rock n roll legend Jack White unveils his needle-in-a-haystack quest to track down a historic one-of-a-kind recording trailer thats been absent for decades

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel shakes things up by taking on a custom vintage vehicle project for a Hollywood picture car coordinator

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: Its D-Day for the Clermont Diggers - they have just 48 hours to repay investor Dennis. Meanwhile, Robs gold haul is washed down the river

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: A group of prospectors searches for gold in some of Australias most secluded and inhospitable areas, facing danger as price for attaining a fortune. A catastrophic breakdown threatens to end the Clermont Diggers mining season, while the rookie miners gamble to relocate their old plant ends in disaster

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A prop from the movie Cleopatra and a 1922 silver peace dollar make for an interesting day at the Gold and Silver pawn shop

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick rocks out when a seller brings in a blazer worn by the Rolling Stones Keith Richards. Chum brings out his inner warrior when a Japanese Samurai mask hits the counter. Meanwhile, Corey tries to paint a picture-perfect deal when a Norman Rockwell autograph comes into the shop

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Its all in the family in Moreno Valley, as Emily brings along her cowboy husband. Ivy is displeased at Marys fraternisation with the auctioneer, and takes it out on her later. Meanwhile, Kenny looks for anything in his locker that can wash off that storage scent

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The Vegas ladies show up in Bourgie Brea, and find the place fascinating. Mary decides to deal with her storage stress by introducing a bit of yoga into her routine. Ivy and Dave go head to head on a giant pair of sister lockers, though Dave then chooses to sit out the rest of the time

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Victorville, Ivy takes it easy, letting Ivy Jr run the operation. Kenny feels run down and his lack of focus lands him a locker - though theres a pleasant surprise in the end. Mary, Shana and Edwina just cannot seem to make anything stick, so decide to embrace it, doing what they do best.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Cloudy with a Chance of Profit
programme.desc: Its a momentous occasion in Van Nuys for Darrell, and he enjoys a completely groovy time with it. Ivy starts his day off with an unwelcome bang, while Brandi and Jarrod are left wondering whether their unit will bring clear skies or clouds ahead

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts and Matt Williams visit archaeological digs across the country, beginning with a look at the work being carried out in the east of England. The presenters visit Norwich Castle Museum, where they find out about developments at Must Farm in Cambridgeshire, a hunt for Roman treasure in Colchester, a burial site at Abington, an Anglo-Saxon royal hall at Lyminge, the 16th-century Tudor Basing House, and a dig involving Emperor Nero at Silchester

programme.title: Britains X Files
programme.desc: Investigative journalist Tim Tate combs through previously top-secret government files which disclose the details of extensive military, spy agency and police investigations into the paranormal

programme.title: Secrets in the Sand
programme.sub-title: Lady Be Good Wreck and The GoBekli Tepe Calendar
programme.desc: Extraordinary curiosities that were once concealed within the planets desert sands, only to be finally brought to light by the elements themselves

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: Inspired by the stories of his shipwrecked relatives, Ross heads up to the Royal Navys historic naval base in the far northerly Orkney Islands, Scapa Flow. Here, Ross and dive supervisor Neil Brock link up with expert local dive guide Emily Turton and head out into the water to dive on Second World War wrecks. Ross and Emily explore a captured German scout ship called the F2 and recover a slew of artefacts that could be linked to Rosss two relatives who died serving in the Royal Navy during the conflict. Ross investigates how Winston Churchill hit upon a revolutionary tactic to defend Scapa Flow from U-boat attacks, as the wreck of the sunken SS Tabarka finally gives up its secrets

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: To take on the deepest wrecks in Scapa Flow, Ross needs to successfully navigate decompression training before heading out with local dive guide Emily Turton to dive on one of the biggest of the Kaiser?s Imperial war ships from the First World War, SMS Karlsruhe. As he explores the eerie relic, Ross tries to understand how and why the German fleet ended up on the Scottish seabed, when they had already surrendered months earlier. Having resolved one enduring mystery, he then heads 600 miles south to meet with ex-serviceman Mark Culwick and dive on an experimental British aircraft carrier submarine built in the 1920s called the M2. This unique vessel was lost in shocking circumstances, with all hands. During his dive Ross starts to understand the horrifying truth ofexactly how and why the 60 men on board never came home

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: The actor is joined by advanced technical diver Emily Turton in north Devon, as he prepares to dive down on the wreck of a sunken steam ship. Iona II was heading to America in the early 1860s, when it went down with a mystery cargo on board that the owners went to extensive efforts to recover in secret. The pair embark on a night dive with the hope it will reveal what the owners so desperately tried to covertly retrieve. Determined to get to the bottom of the mystery, Ross also meets with a maritime historian who has uncovered Iona IIs shocking purpose. Ross and maritime archaeologist Mallory Haas head to Plymouth to dive on a newly discovered wreck, and to uncover a staggering artefact that links the site to one of the most controversial and censored periods in British history - the transatlantic slave trade

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania preservationist opens the doors to his jaw-dropping historic properties. The Wolfe brothers sift through a rockstar pickers off-limits collection

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: A dangerous slip-up reminds the contestants not to play with sharp objects as they make knives from old toys and recreate an iconic American blade

programme.title: Weird Britain
programme.desc: Andy McGrath explores creepy dolls and a haunted hearse at Nottinghams macabre museum with Dr Kate Cherrell. Kate visits the National Justice Museum, a 17th-century courthouse and prison that may still house the spirits of former inmates. Meanwhile, Andy heads to one of Britains oldest pubs, where he learns how an unpaid bar tab contributed to the legend of a cursed galleon. Later, he embarks on a quest to find evidence that Robin Hood, Nottinghamshires legendary hero, may have been more than just a myth

programme.sub-title: Lets Give Em Something to Tonka About
programme.desc: Its a long way to Murietta, and Dave is counting on his competition being unwilling to buy a big locker they need to move. Ivy and Ivy Jr find their day somewhat therapeutic, Mary finally finds a tiny treasure to take home, while Rene stands his ground to protect his honour

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers head to Torrance, where Dave sees his profits grow - amongst other things. Mary finds clothes that dont fit her, which turns out to be a good thing. Plus, Kenny takes a chance at being an early bird, but winds up looking more like a dodo

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: What Came First: The Chicken or the Auction?
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by the sheer number of units up for auction in Rialto, Mary and Ivy wager that each can better predict final locker prices than the other. Daves locker closely resembles a chop shop, while Rene and Tatianna catch a stash of vintage sporting goods

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Emily brings her mother along, Darrell wastes no time finding an advantage, Ivy and Ivy Jr clean up with their locker, while Kenny gets some advice from a music legend. Shana and Edwina settle for thrifting whats in front of them

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts and Matt Williams visit the Dorset Country Museum, where they explore finds from archaeological digs across the west of Britain. The presenters examine objects found at a Bronze Age burial site in Barrowclump, a Roman army site called Durotriges and the site of an early hospital at Winchester, Hampshire. Plus, a hoard found by metal detectors revealing hidden secrets of childhood 1,000 years ago, and a Roman settlement at Ipplepen in Devon

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: The team probes a Knight of Maltas potential Oak Island visit and captures video footage of what could be buried treasure underground

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed with Danny Trejo

programme.title: Egypts Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Despite being one of the most studied civilizations, rich in history, culture, science and art, much of Ancient Egypt remains a great mystery to this day. This series uses the latest science and cutting-edge technology to help experts solve some of Egypts most enduring mysteries that have tormented scientists for years. Here, science reveals new insights into belief and superstition in the land of the pharaohs, from finding the long-lost Land of Punt to Tutankhamun

programme.title: Egypts Unexplained Files
programme.desc: New technology is used to decode some of Egypts most enduring enigmas. The mysteries behind the ancient Egyptians obsession with death and the afterlife

programme.title: Jackass 3 (2010)
programme.desc: Third movie based on the MTV comedy series, in which Johnny Knoxville, Bam Margera, Ryan Dunn and the rest of the fearless team of pranksters embark on even more strange and disturbing stunts, which range from gluing themselves together, enraging dangerous animals and firing an occupied portable toilet from a catapult

programme.title: Napoleon Dynamite (2004)
programme.desc: A socially inept high-school student and his lonely unemployed brother find their eccentric home life thrown into upheaval when their meddling uncle comes to stay. The teenage oddball tries to make the best of his changing circumstances, while putting all his skills to the task of helping his new best friend win the class presidency. Comedy, starring Jon Heder, Efren Ramirez and Haylie Duff

programme.title: The Big Chill (1983)
programme.desc: Seven old friends are reunited when they gather for the funeral of a former fellow college student. Over the course of a weekend together, they reflect on the dead mans demise and how their attitudes to life have changed since they last met, reminiscing on the faded idealism of youth. Drama, starring Glenn Close, Tom Berenger, Kevin Kline, Jeff Goldblum, William Hurt and Meg Tilly

programme.title: It Takes Two (1996)
programme.desc: Two lookalike youngsters trade places to help resolve each others problems. Childrens comedy, starring Kirstie Alley, Steve Guttenberg and Mary-Kate and Ashley Olsen

programme.title: Stuart Little (1999)
programme.desc: An American couple decide their son needs a brother, and plan to adopt another child - but when they get to the orphanage they are greeted by a charming talking mouse named Stuart, who fits the bill perfectly. However, their jealous cat hatches a plot to get rid of the new arrival. Comedy adventure, starring Geena Davis and Hugh Laurie, with the voice of Michael J Fox

programme.title: Stuart Little 2 (2002)
programme.desc: The plucky talking mouse feels left out when the son of his adopted human family makes a new pal - but quickly forgets such trifling matters when his high-flying canary friend is captured by an evil falcon, prompting the brave rodent to mount a daring rescue. Family adventure sequel, with Geena Davis, Hugh Laurie and Jonathan Lipnicki, and the voices of Michael J Fox, Melanie Griffith and James Woods

programme.title: Mousehunt (1997)
programme.desc: Two destitute brothers stand to make a fortune by auctioning off the family home, but before the sale can be finalised they face the task of evicting its resident mouse. However, the resourceful rodent would rather stay put, and outwits their every bungling attempt to oust it. Slapstick comedy, starring Lee Evans, Nathan Lane and Christopher Walken

programme.title: Big Daddy (1999)
programme.desc: An immature 32-year-old is heartbroken when his girlfriend walks out on him. In a plan to win her back, he volunteers to look after his flatmates five-year-old son, thus demonstrating he is finally ready to grow up. However, his ideas of childcare prove unconventional and chaos quickly ensues. Comedy, with Adam Sandler, Joey Lauren Adams, Jon Stewart, Josh Mostel, Leslie Mann, Rob Schneider and Kristy Swanson, alongside Steve Buscemi in a cameo role

programme.title: Instant Family (2018)
programme.desc: After being taunted by relatives who think they will never have kids, married couple Pete and Ellie Wagner consider the option of adopting a child. However, they get more than they bargained for when they take in a rebellious teen and her two siblings. Director Sean Anders comedy, starring Mark Wahlberg, Rose Byrne and Isabela Merced

programme.title: Just Go with It (2011)
programme.desc: A plastic surgeon pretends to be unhappily married to seduce women. When his girlfriend finds his prop wedding ring, he claims he is getting a divorce and has to persuade his assistant to pose as his soon-to-be ex-wife, but is forced to come up with yet more lies to maintain the illusion. Romantic comedy, starring Adam Sandler, Jennifer Aniston and Nicole Kidman

programme.title: Daddy Day Care (2003)
programme.desc: Two unemployed executives decide to open a day-care centre, believing they have found an easy way to make a profit - but instead discover looking after a horde of rampant kids is not as simple as it seems. Family comedy, starring Eddie Murphy, Jeff Garlin, Steve Zahn and Anjelica Huston

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days (2003)
programme.desc: A female journalist sets out to demonstrate how women manage to put off prospective partners, and spies the perfect man on whom to test her theories. However, the experiment takes an unexpected turn thanks to her guinea pig, who has a hidden agenda of his own. Romantic comedy, starring Kate Hudson, Matthew McConaughey, Adam Goldberg and Michael Michele

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice (2002)
programme.desc: An idealistic lawyer catches the attention of a real-estate tycoon, who offers her a job. She starts out thinking she can change his venal ways, but quickly tires of running his life for him. Finding himself in desperate need of her support, the self-absorbed millionaire pulls out all the stops to win her back. Romantic comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Hugh Grant, Alicia Witt and Dana Ivey

programme.title: Sex Tape (2014)
programme.desc: A married couple decide to put some passion back into their dull marriage by filming themselves having sex. However, a technological mix-up results in the footage being uploaded to various gadgets, and they race against time to recover all the copies before it ends up in the public eye. Comedy, starring Cameron Diaz and Jason Segel

programme.desc: The competitive giant vegetable-growing world is rocked by scandal when a prized marrow plant is stolen. British mockumentary, starring Jo Hartley, Aisling Bea and Ray Fearon

Family comedy, starring Eddie Murphy, Jeff Garlin, Steve Zahn and Anjelica Huston

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop (2009)
programme.desc: A single father is determined to become a police officer but fails the medical because he is overweight. To compensate, he goes to absurd lengths to succeed in his job as a security guard, but when criminals lay siege to his place of work, he finds his opportunity to prove his worth to law enforcement. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Keir ODonnell

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2 (2015)
programme.desc: The bumbling security guard is invited to attend a conference in Las Vegas, and brings his teenage daughter along for a family holiday before she leaves for college. However, he is forced to leap into action when he uncovers a gang of criminals are plotting a casino heist. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Raini Rodriguez

programme.title: Back to the Future (1985)
programme.desc: Teenager Marty McFly travels back to the 1950s in a time machine built by his eccentric inventor friend. The return journey proves tricky enough, but he also accidentally alters the sequence of events that led to his parents falling in love - and has to persuade his future dad to win his mothers heart, or he will never be born. Sci-fi comedy adventure, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson and Crispin Glover

programme.title: Back to the Future Part II (1989)
programme.desc: Time-travelling teenager Marty McFly travels to the 21st century, where he has to save his children from a terrible fate. However, this proves to have unforeseen consequences when the future version of arch enemy Biff sees a chance to rewrite history for his own benefit, leaving Marty stuck in a twisted parallel universe. Sci-fi comedy sequel, starring Michael J Fox and Christopher Lloyd

programme.title: Back to the Future Part III (1990)
programme.desc: Time-travelling teenager Marty McFly is transported back to the days of the Wild West, where he strives to save his eccentric scientist friend Doc Brown from death at the hands of a villainous gunslinger. Final instalment in the sci-fi comedy trilogy, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Mary Steenburgen and Thomas F Wilson

programme.title: The Estate (2022)
programme.desc: Two sisters attempt to win over their terminally ill, difficult-to-please aunt in the hope of becoming the beneficiaries of her wealthy estate, only to find the rest of their greedy family members have the same idea. Comedy, starring Toni Collette, Anna Faris, David Duchovny and Kathleen Turner

programme.title: Blithe Spirit (2020)
programme.desc: A spiritualist medium holds a seance for a writer suffering from writers block, but accidentally summons the spirit of his deceased first wife. That leads to an increasingly complex love triangle with his current spouse of five years. Director Edward Halls take on the Noel Coward comedy, starring Isla Fisher, Dan Stevens and Leslie Mann

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: Pete and Myka become trapped in the warehouse, and Artie must answer to his superiors. Sci-fi drama, starring Eddie McClintock and Joanne Kelly

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: Myka returns home to visit her dying father, but discovers his illness is the result of exposure to an artefact. Sci-fi drama, starring Eddie McClintock and Joanne Kelly

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: County sheriff Rick Grimes wakes from a coma in an Atlanta hospital to find the world has been ravaged by an epidemic of zombies. He sets off on a journey to find his missing family, and meets two people who teach him the new rules for survival. Post-apocalyptic drama based on a comic book series, written and directed by Frank Darabont and starring Andrew Lincoln

programme.title: Reginald the Vampire
programme.desc: In a world full of beautiful but vain vampires, Reginald tumbles in as an unlikely and unconventional hero who navigates every obstacle and discovers new and unrecognised powers of his own. Vampire comedy starring Jacob Batalon based on Johnny B Truants Fat Vampire novel series

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visits Castle Leslie in Co Monaghan, Ireland, a family home which is haunted by unknown spirits. With Yvette Fielding and spirit medium Derek Acorah

programme.title: Most Haunted

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Quirky Eggheads and Texas Snow Globes
programme.desc: With Dr Sturgis still in a psychiatric hospital, Mary worries about Sheldons mental health and whether a similar outcome is in his future. Meanwhile, Georgie tries to earn money by selling Texas snow globes. Iain Armitage and Zoe Penny star

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Broom Closet and Satans Monopoly Board
programme.desc: The prodigy must find a new way to stay academically challenged without the university class run by Dr Sturgis. programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: An Entrepreneurialist and a Swat on the Bottom
programme.desc: Meemaw and Sheldon fall out when she refuses to take him to the lecture, so the youngster makes his own plans. Meanwhile, Georgie tries to impress Veronica with expensive jewellery after he starts selling candy at school. Iain Armitage and Montana Jordan star, with the voice of Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is upset after Lucy runs away in the middle of their date, leaving the gang to cheer him up. However, when Howard bumps into her, she admits she is incredibly shy. Meanwhile, Sheldon asks Penny to help with a new episode of Fun with Flags, and because he is impressed by her acting ability, the friends go to see her in a performance of A Streetcar Named Desire

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While the girls go to Disneyland and get made up as princesses, the guys have to promote science as a career option for women at Howards old middle school. Meanwhile, Raj and Lucy have their first date in a library, where instead of speaking to each other they send text messages

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette and Howard host a dinner party, but as it falls on Sheldons Thai food night, he opts to bring his own dinner. As punishment for his lack of manners, the gang decides he should organise Wolowitzs cluttered wardrobe, but he discovers an unopened letter from Howards father, who hasnt made contact in years

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys compete for a tenured professor position at the university, leading them to try to win over the committee in charge of appointing a new staff member, and arguing about who deserves the spot the most. However, the panel includes Mrs Davis from Human Resources, whom Sheldon has crossed paths with before. Guest starring Regina King

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy tries to help Sheldon get over his desire for closure when one of his favourite TV shows is cancelled on a cliffhanger ending. Raj discovers his new girlfriend Lucy has a blog in which she has written about him, and is upset when he learns she believes he has feminine qualities, causing him to worry about their relationship

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon discover their favourite childhood TV science show host Professor Proton can be booked for private parties and decide to hire him to entertain them. Meanwhile, Raja asks Howard and Bernard to look after his dog for the weekend, but the couple panic when the canine goes missing. Guest starring Bob Newark

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys invite the girls to a Dungeons and Dragons night when their trip to Vegas falls through after an incident with airport security. However, following a few drinks, Sheldon and Amys relationship takes an unexpected turn. Meanwhile, Raj goes on a date with Lucy, who tries to sneak out of the restaurants bathroom window - but ends up getting stuck and calling for his help

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is offered an exciting job opportunity, but it will mean he has to leave the country for several months. Penny tries to support his ambitions, while Sheldon is jealous and attempts to discourage him from accepting the post. Meanwhile, Raja pushes the boundaries with Lucy, but puts their relationship in jeopardy

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: Mike finds himself in hot water when Molly finds out he purchased Vinces used car, a 1957 Chevy Bel Air, without consulting her first because she thinks they should be saving for the wedding

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: Mike gets caught up in an argument between Molly and her family - and unwittingly makes matters worse. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: Mike is thoroughly spooked when Mollys boss invites them to a costume party at his house on Halloween night, which is a holiday he always dreads. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Hobbitses, Physicses and a Ball with Zip
programme.desc: The youngster tries to take his mind off a difficult science problem by reading The Lord of the Rings, but this just leads to a whole new obsession. Meanwhile, Missy asks George to teach her about baseball so she can impress a boy at school

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Pineapple and the Bosom of Male Friendship
programme.desc: Dr Sturgis is discharged from hospital, but after returning home he unexpectedly calls a halt to his relationship with Meemaw. US comedy, starring Wallace Shawn and Annie Potts

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Parasol and a Hell of an Arm
programme.desc: A church carnival leads Missy to try out for the baseball team. Meemaw struggles after her break-up with Dr Sturgis. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage, Raegan Revord and Annie Potts

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Penny bond as they miss Leonard, and Howard tries to help Raj get over his break-up with Lucy. Meanwhile, Bernadette and Amy visit an out-of-town biology convention. Comedy about four high-achieving scientists, starring Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard returns from his research expedition in the North Sea and undergoes an adjustment period with Sheldon. Howard experiences an unusual emotional reaction as a result of his relationship with his mother. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends compete in a scavenger hunt designed by Raj to test their scientific knowledge and life skills, but the game brings out the best and worst in everyone. As the hunt progresses, Howard and Amy begin to bond over their shared musical tastes, while Penny and Sheldon work together as a team and Bernadette becomes fiercely competitive

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon introduces Amy to Raiders of the Lost Ark - one of his favourite films - and is distraught when she ends up pointing out a plot hole that ruins the whole story. Meanwhile, Leonard realises he can manipulate Penny into feeling sorry for him when his mother publishes a reveal-all book about his childhood problems. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon re-evaluates the time he spends with Amy when she takes a job at the university. Meanwhile, Howard is forced to sleep on his friends sofa after he gets into an argument with Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Mayim Bialik

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon stumbles upon a major scientific breakthrough, causing him to feel like a fraud, while Penny steps up her game with Leonard after seeing Howard make a romantic gesture to Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is hurt when Professor Proton contacts Leonard for help, so he befriends TV scientist Bill Nye, and Raj gets jealous when Howard crashes a girls night in making home-made jewellery. Guest starring Bob Newhart, with Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki, and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard becomes concerned that Sheldon will overreact when his friend learns the truth about a past indiscretion, while Penny confronts Rajs old flame Lucy about the way she ended their relationship. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When the guys are unable to get tickets for Comic-Con, Leonard, Howard and Raj decide to buy fake passes from a stranger - but they then worry about getting caught with them. Comedy, guest starring James Earl Jones and Carrie Fisher

Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Melissa Rauch

programme.desc: When a German Shepherd puppy dies, pet owners blame the breeder; the Judge investigates allegations of parvo running rampant in the litter.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A man denies having intimate relations with a woman; she claims he lived with her for two months and assaulted her daughter.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A woman goes after her estranged daughter-in-law for thousands in unpaid loans; she is met with rage over an allegedly deadbeat husband.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Afraid that her intoxicated friend was about to be raped, a woman claims she pushed through an already broken window to rescue her; she is sued for breaking the window.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Accused of being a crook after allegedly selling a $500 rug for $7500, a carpet shop owner denies all charges

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A teenager accuses a teacher of punching him in the chest during an incident at school; the teacher countersues for attorney fees and punitive damages.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Teenagers brawl in a parking lot and the police are called in; damages form alleged kicking, spitting on and keying cars are disputed.

programme.title: Murder UK
programme.desc: In June 2010, taxi driver Derrick Bird went on one of the worst killing sprees in British history. He shot dead twelve people and injured many more.

programme.title: Fatal Fraud
programme.desc: A couple set up a weapons business in West Virginia. All is not what it seems, leading to a fatal end.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Found shot near Highway 67 in 1986, Maria Pilar Del Gadillo Carrillo remained unidentified until 2024, when authorities used genetic genealogy and reopened her case.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A woman claims her ex-boyfriend slashed her tyres but fails to prove a word of her story; he is still in the hot seat for alleged theft of her property.

programme.title: Judge Judy

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A man claims he was attacked in a sober-living facility; his housemate says he was leaving the stove on overnight to heat the place.

programme.title: Judge Judy

programme.title: Judge Judy

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Host Dara O Briain and regulars Hugh Dennis and Andy Parsons are joined by Rob Beckett, Susan Calman, Hal Cruttenden and Romesh Ranganathan on an edition of the comedy quiz first aired in July 2014. The panellists give their take on that weeks major news stories and participate in a series of stand-up spots and improvised games

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show in which two teams headed by David Mitchell and Lee Mack try to hoodwink each other with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Micky Flanagan, Fiona Bruce, Claudia Winkleman and Steve Jones are first up, with stories including performing a striptease at a lacklustre hen party and saving P Diddy from drowning

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Festive edition of the award-winning comedy panel show, with actor Jim Broadbent, broadcaster Angela Rippon and comedians Rose Matafeo and Ardal OHanlon joining host Rob Brydon and team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack. As ever, the players reveal amazing stories about themselves - but are they telling the truth or making it all up? Can their opponents sort the wheat from the chaff and take away whatever seasonal spoils are to be had?

programme.title: Cops on the Rock
programme.desc: Customs officers fish hash bales out of the sea and incinerate them, discarded smugglers jerry cans wash up on a beach, and cops stop a car laden with extra fuel

programme.title: Railroad Australia
programme.desc: In Victoria, a crack team races to build the states VLocity trains of the future. Slippery tracks and kangaroos throw a 5,000-tonne coal train off its path to port

programme.title: Rick Steins Mediterranean Escapes
programme.desc: The chef experiences the bustling and colourful fish market in the Sicilian city of Catania and discovers dishes developed through centuries of poverty in Puglia on Italys mainland. However, he is shocked to wake up one morning to find his vehicle is missing

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Thousands of dollars of cartel cash are found hidden in an engine, an intoxicated 17-year-old requires urgent medical treatment, and cocaine is found in bags of rubbish

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Cocaine is found hidden inside the wall of a refrigerated truck, and a Honduran immigrant fleeing gang violence applies for asylum in the US

programme.title: Guy Martin: Proper Jobs
programme.desc: The presenter travels to a remote island in the Hebrides to live and work on a dairy farm during calving season - after learning the ropes, he milks a herd of cows by himself

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: In an episode originally shown in 2011, Jeremy Clarkson celebrates the 50th anniversary of the Jaguar E-type by driving a modern-day interpretation of the classic sports car, and throws a typically low-key party involving live music, fighter planes and the Royal Marines. Richard Hammond is in South Africa, where he tests the Marauder, a bigger, more rugged alternative to the Humvee, and James May enlists the help of 2010 Winter Olympic skeleton gold medallist Amy Williams and former Intercontinental Rally Challenge champion Kris Meeke to try out a Mini rally car. Plus, the Stig takes the BMW 1 Series M Coupe around the test track and Alice Cooper gets behind the wheel of the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The trio travel to Italy to test high-performance hatchbacks. Jeremy Clarkson is in the Citroen DS3 Racing, Richard Hammond champions the Fiat 500C Abarth and James May makes the case for the Renaultsport Clio 200 Cup as they navigate their way round baffling Italian towns and take part in a scavenger hunt, before putting the cars through their paces on the F1 street circuit in Monaco. Also, petrolhead comedian Ross Noble is in the Reasonably Priced Car and the McLaren MP4-12C supercar comes under review

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore the nations love affair with beer and cider, revealing how at one time it was safer to drink ale than water. The duo are also given a chance to gain hands-on brewing experience at a cider festival

programme.title: Rick Steins Mediterranean Escapes
programme.desc: The chef experiences the bustling and colourful fish market in the Sicilian city of Catania and discovers dishes developed through centuries of poverty in Puglia on Italys mainland. However, he is shocked to wake up one morning to find his vehicle is missing

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Bez, Motsi Mabuse, Shazia Mirza and Steve Pemberton join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. Kirstys working day is disrupted by Warrens mind games, Jay and Pollys relationship runs into problems, and Jeff learns whether he still has a job as a paramedic

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Quinnan goes out on his stag party - but with Hollis organising it, anything could happen before the night is over

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Lucy admits the truth to Ian, and Ricky feels Carols wrath. Bens party goes off with a bang when Shirley gets the wrong end of the stick, and an unexpected visitor appears

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Lucy puts Ian in an impossible situation, while Phil has something to hide. Jeans behaviour causes concern for Max - but it looks like the worst is yet to come

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: James and Helen get ready to move to Rowangarth and experience more of Granville Bennetts hospitality. Rural drama, starring Christopher Timothy, Robert Hardy and Lynda Bellingham

programme.title: Howards Way
programme.desc: Leo and Orrin engage in a violent argument over Abby, causing them both to fall in the river. Meanwhile, Tom is furious with Jack for neglecting his work

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: Comedy drama about an oddball couple of private detectives who investigate crime in Stratford-upon-Avon. Frank and Lu are drawn into Stratfords Silicon Valley when Spider calls upon their help to expose a mole within tech company Forosa. Mark Benton and Jo Joyner star

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Traceys house becomes infested with mice, forcing her to shelve plans for a perfume-selling party. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Whos That Looking Sideways at Nelly?
programme.desc: Hobbo enlists the help of Aunty Wainwright to become a master of disguise and deceive his secret enemies, and is delighted when Marina is attracted to his new looks - to the great annoyance of Howard. Meanwhile, a misunderstanding over a neck injury puts the police on Alvin and Entwistles trail

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Nobody Messes with Tony the Throat
programme.desc: Hobbo, Alvin and Entwistle set out to save the day when Howard suspects Pearl is seeing someone else and the trio soon draw up a surveillance operation that leads them to a seedy bikers club. Toby sets out to find Aunty Wainwright when he has ironing problems

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Will Stella Find True Love with Norris Fairburn?
programme.desc: After suffering a brush with Stella, Hobbo comes to the conclusion that it is time to find her a man - and, with the help of Clegg and Truly, he decides that eligible village heart-throb Norris Fairburn is the right match. Pearls new-found passion for motorcycling causes trouble for Howard and Marina

programme.title: Whitstable Pearl
programme.desc: Halloween gets spookier when a ghost tour guide sees a body being buried on the beach, but when police uncover nothing, Pearl is on the lookout for a missing body

programme.title: Whitstable Pearl
programme.desc: A taxi driver turns up dead with a bullet through his head, and an investment banker is nearly assassinated

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: A man wrongly convicted of burning down a school is released, and seeks Halfords help in tracking down the culprit. Standing meets a woman who claims to be his daughter (played by Dennis Watermans real-life daughter Hannah) but Lane is not convinced she is telling the truth. Pullman is offered a promotion to head of the Murder Squad. Kevin Whately and Joe Absalom guest star

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The detectives investigate the death of a woman who has been killed in a hit-and-run incident. Suspicion falls on the man who found her body, but he denies ever having met her. Lynley and Havers visit the victims estranged husband and son, neither of whom has seen her since she walked out after her daughters murder 30 years previously. Nathaniel Parker and Sharon Small star

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: James and Helen get ready to move to Rowangarth and experience more of Granville Bennetts hospitality. Rural drama, starring Christopher Timothy, Robert Hardy and Lynda Bellingham

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.sub-title: From the Cradle to the Grave
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when a museums Egyptian mummy case turns out to contain the body of a very recently deceased woman

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon gets a shock when Social Security staff realise they are authorising rent payments for her old flat when she is no longer living there and her lodger is in prison

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Quinnans wedding day dawns, but the reappearance of Garfield is just one of the many clouds on the horizon

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Melody helps a film studies lecturer and his student who are willing to sacrifice their careers to protect their illicit romance. Eva has second thoughts about going to Newcastle to arrange a transfer after Jimmi declares his love for her at a retirement party and starts singing on stage

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Ruth helps a pregnant girl stand up to the father of her baby. Vivien experiences problems with public transport and takes out her frustrations at work, while Eva considers moving back in with Jimmi - after coming to a certain agreement

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Rosie receives good news, but Mubbs does not seem interested, and Diane struggles to cope as Joannas life hangs in the balance - along with that of her unborn baby. Luckily, Owen is able to save the child - but it could be at the expense of the mother. Meanwhile, the driver responsible attempts to chat up Donna, but when she learns he is a drug dealer she goes behind Zubins back to arrange his downfall

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Ruth stands by her decision to have Charlie moved out of the ED, resulting in a frosty reception from the staff on her first day as clinical standards manager. She finally plucks up the courage to confront Edward about his homosexuality, hoping she can turn the situation to her advantage. Meanwhile, Lenny is reluctant to visit a woman in need of his help, but a patients plight later prompts a change of heart

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Quinnans wedding day dawns, but the reappearance of Garfield is just one of the many clouds on the horizon

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Max is determined to find Stacey, but his grim task leaves him shaken. Becca offers comfort, but does she know more than shes letting on?

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: When Max finally tracks down Stacey, old wounds are re-opened and fresh ones created

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: Siegfried gives another lecture on economy to Calum, who is visited by Molly McFeely, with whose family he stayed while in Ireland - while Deirdre also pays a call at the same time. Meanwhile, James receives an invitation to examine Lord Buttermeres new stallion. Rural drama, starring John McGlynn, Robert Hardy and Christopher Timothy. First broadcast in 1988

programme.title: Howards Way
programme.desc: Tom is attacked by an intruder at the boatyard, while Gerald and Polly have a furious row and end their marriage

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.sub-title: If Music Be the Food of Love
programme.desc: Frank and Lu enter the competitive world of ballroom dancing, brimming with passion and jealousy - and learn the dangers of partners falling in love with one another. Guest starring Ruthie Henshall, Danny John-Jules and Leila Mimmack

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon foils a mugging at Chigwell station, and ends up befriending the intended victim - who turns out to be financial adviser to Doriens husband

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Will Randolph Make a Good Impression?
programme.desc: Hobbos quest to find a man for Stella leads him to put up an advertisement, but the suitor who turns up lacks what it takes to tackle the widow and runs off. However, a chance to hit back emerges when Hobbo finds out who Stellas favourite movie character is

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: In Which Romance Springs a Leak
programme.desc: When Hobbo learns that Howard feels he is taken for granted by Pearl and that Toby misses his former wife, he hatches a plan to sort out their love lives - with the help of flowers, a Mario Lanza recording and his own team of miming violinists

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Variations on a Theme of Fathers Day
programme.desc: Convinced that Nelly is his mother, Hobbo sends Howard to eavesdrop on her and Pearl as he tries to find out more about his father. However, when the women concoct some false information, the police start to take an interest in the mens activities. Comedy, starring Russ Abbot, June Whitfield and Robert Fyfe

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club
programme.sub-title: Murder in the Dark: Part One
programme.desc: When a man is killed at her university reunion, Becks finds herself on the wrong side of an investigation. Was a friend responsible?

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club
programme.sub-title: Murder in the Dark: Part Two
programme.desc: As Judith and Suzie work with the police to find the killer, tensions rise among Becks friends in the house. Guest starring Harry Enfield

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Sandra takes drastic measures to prevent Jack exacting revenge on the hit-and-run driver who killed his wife. With the teams future under threat, she tries desperately to keep the truth about the incident from shady new recruit DS Karen Hardwick, while working on a 10-year-old murder case to restore the squads reputation. Amanda Redman and Lynda Bellingham star

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. When the body of a woman is found, all evidence points to suicide - but Havers is adamant foul play has occurred. Reinstated to the rank of Detective Sergeant and paired once more with Lynley, she sets out to uncover the mysteries surrounding the victim. The trail leads the pair to an exclusive club where Havers goes undercover to delve beneath the respectable surface and find the killer. Jenny Agutter guest stars, with Nathaniel Parker and Sharon Small

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: The newlyweds begin leading separate lives back in their home towns. In Essex, Smithy makes efforts to remind Gavin of the excitement of his bachelor years with a traditional boys night out. Meanwhile in Barry, Stacey tries to distract herself with a trip to the bingo

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary decides to make an honest woman of Dorothy in an effort to prove his commitment, but first has to face the traditional celebration of bachelorhoods end - his stag night. Comedy, starring Martin Clunes, Neil Morrissey, Caroline Quentin and Leslie Ash

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Return of the comedy, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Kiell Smith-Bynoe and Simon Farnaby. Alison and Mike are trying to find a semi-harmonious routine with the ghostly housemates of Button House. The ghosts have found a way to make their new situation work for them, while the couple are working toward a new money-making venture to fund their perpetual renovations. But after a paranormal photo of the house goes viral, Alison and Mike spot an opportunity to bring money in more quickly by using the ghosts talents to create an authentic haunted-house experience

programme.desc: First episode of John Sullivans comedy series, following the lives of Only Fools and Horses characters Boycie and Marlene. Alison and Mike are trying to find a semi-harmonious routine with the ghostly housemates of Button House. The ghosts have found a way to make their new situation work for them, while the couple are working toward a new money-making venture to fund their perpetual renovations. programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: The broadcaster meets Florida woman Jennifer Mee who, as a teenager, became a media sensation when she suffered a particularly strange ailment - a persistent case of hiccups. But in 2010, she lured a man to a dark alleyway where her friends were waiting to rob him. Instead he ended up being shot dead. Even though she didnt pull the trigger, and was nowhere near when the bullets were fired, Jennifer was sentenced to life without parole. Piers charts the journey through fame and rejection that saw Jennifer descend into a criminal lifestyle, and asks family members and legal experts if they believe her punishment was too harsh

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: Piers travels to Gadsden Correctional Facility near Tallahassee in Florida, where he hears the story of Ashley Humphrey. As a 20-year-old in 2003, she pumped eight bullets into barmaid Sandee Rozzo - a crime for which she is now serving 25 years. Piers tries to understand how she came to commit the crime, wondering whether she was persuaded by her domineering and abusive husband - who was being accused of rape by the victim - or if she is simply a cold-blooded killer who came up with the plan herself

programme.title: Alex Jones: Making Babies
programme.desc: Theres heartbreak and jubilation as Alex meets two couples desperately trying to defy the odds and become parents

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles is in Spalding, Lincolnshire, to meet Dakota Read and her family. The eight-year-old was born with quadriplegic cerebral palsy and her home needs to be made more wheelchair-friendly. Enter the DIY SOS builders, who set to work on designer Gabrielle Blackmans vision, although with just nine days to complete the task, theyll need help. Luckily, the local tradespeople are also out in force, giving their time and their skills for free

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Since his wife died shortly after giving birth to their sixth child, Paul Makings has been valiantly holding the family together as they grieve. But hes facing even more problems - living in a two-bedroom house he has started to extend, and forced to sleep on the sofa. Nick Knowles and the team are joined by more than 100 locals in Misterton, Nottinghamshire, as they take on their biggest home build ever. However, they have to battle against a blizzard to complete the job in nine days

programme.title: My Dream Home
programme.desc: Drew Scott and Jonathan Scott come to the aid of Joe and Jessie, who are searching for a large farmhouse-style home

programme.title: My Dream Home
programme.desc: Drew and Jonathan Scott host the property renovation series. Nicoles music career is taking flight, so the Scott twins try to help her find a great home

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team travel to Hessle, near Hull in East Yorkshire, to transform the home of Darren Hudson, who was left paralysed from the waist down due to a spinal cord injury. After three months of hospital rehabilitation, Darren returned home to his family, but tragedy struck again eight days later when his wife Sarah died suddenly. Since that moment, Darren and his three sons have been living in emotional trauma, with the wheelchair-using dad now the main carer for the family

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles is in Spalding, Lincolnshire, to meet Dakota Read and her family.
